| | | **HOUSE REPUBLICANS RAISE $17 MILLION IN ONE NIGHT**
I need you to understand what's happening:

\-- Trump hinted he'll run for President if Republicans retake the House.
\-- He just PERSONALLY headlined a massive fundraiser to help them do it.
**\-- And I just learned they raised a staggering $17 MILLION _in one single night._**

I have no choice but to take drastic action to fix this.

**[I've launched my 2022 Democratic Membership Drive to give us a head start. I'm calling for 1,250 grassroots Democrats to confirm their 2022 Membership to help me have an UNPRECEDENTED fundraising haul of our own, OUTRAISE Republicans, and SQUASH their hopes of regaining power. Can I count on you to confirm your 2022 Membership with $3 before my Mid Month Deadline? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)** | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/yr-)
2022 DEMOCRATIC MEMBERSHIP STATUS: **PENDING**
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[Suggested Support: $3](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

We are at a crossroads.

We can either let Republicans use this new war chest to blanket the airwaves with lies about Democrats, take our Majority, and destroy all of our progress...

...OR we can unite, build an UNPRECEDENTED base of Democratic Members, and stop Republicans from ever holding power again.

**[I'll be blunt: Unless we outraise Republicans, Democrats could be powerless to protect our Majority and beat back Republicans' expensive attacks to destroy us. I'm calling for an IMMEDIATE response -- 1,250 more Membership gifts before my Mid Month Deadline -- from every grassroots Democrat who cares about protecting the incredible progress we've made this year and preserving our Democratic Majority. Can I count on you to confirm your 2022 Membership with $3 right away? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

name: Val Demings
subject: I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
As I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign
| | |
---
I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare.
So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate.
Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was _destined_ for something bigger.
So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader who understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win.
So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups.

It's critical that we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida.
My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40731415/325688997/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2110-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjE2NWI2YS05Njc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MurKGb4BCz_DpGEgC5w73rTKIenS_Fj3uhb6sktNSaY=)**
All the best,

Val Demings
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40731416/325688998/1804727444?refcode=jtk2110-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjE2NWI2YS05Njc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MurKGb4BCz_DpGEgC5w73rTKIenS_Fj3uhb6sktNSaY=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? **[Click here to donate now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40731417/325688999/1804727444?refcode=jtk2110-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjE2NWI2YS05Njc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MurKGb4BCz_DpGEgC5w73rTKIenS_Fj3uhb6sktNSaY=)** If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, **[please click here to visit my campaign store.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40731418/325689000/-460395862?refcode=jtk2110-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjE2NWI2YS05Njc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MurKGb4BCz_DpGEgC5w73rTKIenS_Fj3uhb6sktNSaY=&emci=d82d7a91-6b72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=16165b6a-9676-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=20244100)** Thank you for your continued support. clean_body: As I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign | | | I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare. So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate. Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was destined for something bigger. So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader who understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win. So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups. It's critical that we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida. My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: = All the best, Val Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring updates from Val Demings for U.S. Senate, including by automated text message. Txt HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. &

name: Aadland For Congress
subject: You're invited to a Brew-Pub Party
body:
Join Erik in Golden this Wednesday
| | | |
---
| Hello Peter,
You are invited to a Brew-Pub hosted Meet & Greet Petition Party in Golden this Wednesday! Erik will speak for a bit, then spend time meeting you, answering questions and talking about the upcoming campaign for CD7.
If you are a resident of CD7 (we can help find out if you're unsure) please plan to sign the petition to get Erik onto the primary ballot. If you're not, come join us anyway, it will be fun!
Also, you can learn how to help the campaign while enjoying Barrels & Bottles' fine craft beers.
---
| |
---
|
# In Golden Wednesday January 19th 5:00PM

|
---

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friends,

Donald Trump is back in Arizona. He knows how important this state is, and he knows how important our race is.

That’s why last time he was here, he said “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”

And the truth is, if we don’t have the resources we need to win this race, he might get his wish. If he can help flip this seat in 2022, it might make him more likely to run (and win) in 2024.

Sorry to put that thought in your head, but it’s true.

That’s why we’re asking if you can make a $5 contribution before Trump arrives. Because when he does, it’s going to generate a lot of attention and a lot of people on the far-right will be even more fired up to beat Mark.

So we’re asking:

[Can you please make a $5 contribution to help Mark Kelly defend this seat? It all adds up when everyone is chipping in. That’s how we win.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5009?t=6&akid=1124%2E878179%2ELI8V8m) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5010?t=7&akid=1124%2E878179%2ELI8V8m)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5011?t=8&akid=1124%2E878179%2ELI8V8m)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5012?t=9&akid=1124%2E878179%2ELI8V8m)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5013?t=10&akid=1124%2E878179%2ELI8V8m)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5014?t=11&akid=1124%2E878179%2ELI8V8m)
It is absolutely critical that Mark Kelly holds this seat. And the only way that happens is if we’re all in this together.

Team Kelly
[CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5009?t=12&akid=1124%2E878179%2ELI8V8m)
---
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1124%2E878179%2ELI8V8m). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1124%2E878179%2ELI8V8m).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1124%2E878179%2ELI8V8m) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=1124%2E878179%2ELI8V8m). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1124%2E878179%2ELI8V8m)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=1124%2E878179%2ELI8V8m)

name: American Update
subject: Studying his accomplishments is needed
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8333%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=CTOQzI2EF%2b%2bLqkiak5TF2A&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c12661%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=53%2bvPunjg3LScQvOA0EJPw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c12662%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iP%2f%2fCO3T%2f%2fMc4l%2f%2b46x0MA&sysid=1)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c12661%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=53%2bvPunjg3LScQvOA0EJPw&sysid=1) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c12663%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qLNJQyaJh9l8uV1ZCEbPig&sysid=1)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set: As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship ” on DVD: You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: First Lady Casey DeSantis
subject: Freedom is Prevailing in Florida
body:
I am grateful every single day to live in Florida. Thanks to the leadership of our great governor and my husband, Ron DeSantis,
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrm3k16h5j071hr3381m2rjts5ugdmvlshcb43rg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj60o71c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4ojk65on6tpjcio72cjgeioj9dr1mdrbcshh6mob9djlm1jr5dr5clg64p3mc1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8p6cc3imdg6fdr4cor61cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
[****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6nfe9lpbkf3d00h8139e69fop3qdhc1eh4a6i6g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj60o71c3h2bs)
Friend,
I am grateful every single day to live in Florida. Thanks to the leadership of our great governor and my husband, Ron DeSantis, **Florida is the freest state in the United States.**
[**CHIP IN $20.22 TO HELP GOVERNOR DESANTIS CONTINUE THE FIGHT FOR FLORIDA >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd02d9dk4daagm38dd8hkhte3ukns90fcorc58no_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj60o71c3h2bs)
But across the country, that freedom has come under assault as politicians have cast aside their citizens' liberty. Thankfully, Florida has a governor who stands courageously in the face of sharp opposition to protect our freedom. Thanks to his leadership, Floridians have a right to earn a living without heavy-handed mandates and kids have an opportunity to thrive.
Over the last three years, Governor DeSantis led Florida to record-breaking economic success, which has become the envy of America. Our tax burden is the lowest per capita in the nation, our job growth far outpaces the national average, we are leading the nation in business formations, and our tourism industry is soaring even beyond its pre-pandemic levels. Despite this, federal policies are creating negative headwinds. To that end, Governor DeSantis has proposed a $1 billion gas tax holiday to help Floridians combat rising inflation and gas prices.
With politicians in Democrat-controlled cities and states AGAIN making the disastrous decision to close schools, our governor continues to stand strong for parents and students to keep schools open! We have a governor who is committed to protecting parental rights -- he believes parents must have a say in their child's education, from the curriculum to the decision to vaccinate their child against COVID.
[**CHIP IN TO HELP GOVERNOR DESANTIS KEEP FLORIDA FREE!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z96jmiho8mdp2c1hhkf3d13s9h0p3k658ujvi4so_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj60o71c3h2bs "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/freedom-is-prevailing-fl-hf")
Governor DeSantis has banned Critical Race Theory in our schools. He believes that if a child is subjected to any hateful or discriminating propaganda in school, parents should have legal recourse.
As a husband and father, he knows the importance of keeping our communities safe, which is why he has made it clear that Florida stands for law and order. In addition to the $1,000 bonus checks he awarded to first responders last year, he's calling on the legislature to not only issue another round of bonuses this year but to increase pay for state law enforcement by up to 25% and to provide $5,000 bonuses for new officers, including those already serving in other states who want to relocate to Florida.
Keeping our communities safe also requires enforcing our border laws. With the federal government's indifference towards enforcing the rule of law, our governor is taking action. Governor DeSantis banned sanctuary cities and was the first governor to send reinforcements to Texas to help combat the surge taking place at our southern border. He's fought to stop clandestine flights that drop off illegal immigrants in Florida. He is also introducing proposals to stop these relocation efforts and is hold those who help facilitate such underhanded policies accountable.
He understands that enforcing a strong border means protecting our communities by keeping drugs off our streets and out of our children's hands, and he refuses to allow the federal government's human smuggling operation to go on unchallenged. Florida's citizens shouldn't be forced to bear the burden of the federal government's immigration ineptitude.
Florida counted over 11 million ballots on Election Day. Other states took days, if not weeks, to return ballots, ultimately casting doubt on the integrity of our electoral process. To ensure Florida continues to lead, Governor DeSantis banned "Zuckerbucks," ballot harvesting, the mass sending of mail-in ballots and he strengthened our voter ID laws. He's prepared to take additional measures this legislative session to further ensure Floridians have confidence in our election systems.
Florida is in a better place today because of our governor, but his work isn't finished. With an election coming up this November, I know that with your support, together we can continue building upon the rock of freedom Florida has become.
Get ready, Florida - ** _Governor DeSantis has only just begun to fight for you._**
[**Please rush in a contribution to help us continue to hold the line and keep Florida free. Chip in $20.22, $30, or $50 now!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhjqcgl2o87lmpto6dns48trs15rg36l2bh1o0v0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj60o71c3h2bs)
Sincerely,
Casey DeSantis

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5on4mtfuc7pb75pogg1i94snfvfittg1b5jlrhg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj60o71c3h2bs "CHIP IN NOW") [CHIP IN NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqvkaib0hnmk97nutkf59fh6lu5nfaovm16tssn0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj60o71c3h2bs)
---

Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor

Ron DeSantis for Governor | 301 W. Platt Street, Suite 345, Tampa, FL 33606

body:
Sunday, January 16th Edition
| | | |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TpO8u-wiQRhJ88A-GU_DOpNDj2xdR7FfXy9e3tjdryX62YAfNDYA4IkKEJlsQVbwpV7GwgcDkSHQQXyXH5gof5xE6D1SlmfZQ7talkcDkm1NhWQ6wnT5AnwLeZZZhBAT-SxfhX88NyzS6xagGolOcQ==&c=NorzPffdN2-ZtKfjWpatrPiusm3j4QmEJh0mdVHAECaYzQ-xESG4iQ==&ch=wSojOyBV_y99pk6qzHRFkNBpi5mxT5MXzQQfDFcQzIfPbG6x2vLclA==)

|
---
# Weekly Newsletter
---
|
---
January 16, 2022 | Issue III
---
| |
---
| |
---
### NY Senate, Assembly Republicans, County Executive Blakeman & Law Enforcement: Restore Public Safety
---
With Homicides & Violent Crime on the Rise all Across NY, Republicans Stand With Law Enforcement & Local Officials to Call for a Return to Common Sense Public Safety Solutions
---
---
On Tuesday, Leader Rob Ortt and his colleagues in the New York State Senate, The Assembly Minority Conference, Nassau County Executive Bruce Blakeman, and members of law enforcement gathered for a press conference on their agenda to restore public safety to New York.
"No New Yorker should ever feel unsafe in their homes, neighborhoods, and local communities. Regrettably, the radical extremists now running the State Legislature have placed the interests of dangerous criminals above the rights of everyone else, including crime victims, law-abiding citizens, and the dedicated law enforcement professionals who keep our communities safe. The results are painfully clear, and New Yorkers have had enough. Today, the Senate Republican conference will be introducing a hostile amendment that will repeal the discovery and bail reforms that passed in 2019 and 2020. It's time to restore common sense and public safety to our state now," said Leader Rob Ortt.
---
| [Read Full Release](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TpO8u-wiQRhJ88A-GU_DOpNDj2xdR7FfXy9e3tjdryX62YAfNDYA4Pl8_Z3etcmoLRNEbFx6kraKtNFexKAhvtoDqBklZSh9YuT7Du42tPM1zGe7AaicrH4epJEkAUOs_RODkNIMa7wvlZ0H8AcgPsmA9Xme56P08HMgM1ZcPbAaLVr5nPpEK-vLagXsoCUxvzf7b9jMET93rpdh1TUVJ4y150JuW40OSTo9b6GQJCiYkRJkqCh1WIkvNeOisboAYU-SgZ6diavcNcy4w1KHIQ==&c=NorzPffdN2-ZtKfjWpatrPiusm3j4QmEJh0mdVHAECaYzQ-xESG4iQ==&ch=wSojOyBV_y99pk6qzHRFkNBpi5mxT5MXzQQfDFcQzIfPbG6x2vLclA==)
---
---
|
---
---
### PRO-CRIMINAL POLICIES have resulted in a dangerous crime wave.
---
---
Leader Ortt is fighting to restore common sense and public safety to New York.

* CLOSE the revolving door of violent criminals
* END cashless bail and restore judicial discretion; and
* Support and defend our brave men and women in law enforcement

Join the movement to restore common sense & public safety to NY by signing the petition below
---
| Sign the Petition to Restore Public Safety to New York
---
|
---
### Senate & Assembly Republicans Call on the Farm Laborers Wage Board
---
To Reject Reduction of the Overtime Threshold and Save the Future of Farming in New York State
On Thursday, Leader Rob Ortt held a press conference with Senators George Borrello and Ed Rath, and Assemblymen Mike Norris and Steve Hawley.
The Senators and Assemblymen are advocating for NYS Farmers by urging the Farm Laborers Wage Board to vote against reducing the overtime threshold below the current 60 hours established in the Farm Laborer Fair Labor Practices Act (FLFLPA) of 2019.
"The farming industry is vastly different from other work industries. Late last year, I and members of my conference sent a letter to the Farm Laborers Wage Board urging board members to vote against the reduction of the overtime threshold. Farmers here have advocated their concerns loud and clear: lowering the overtime threshold will jeopardize their livelihoods," said Leader Ortt.
This month, the New York State Farm Labor Wage Board will revisit the threshold set in 2019 and make a determination on whether to lower the threshold to 40 hours. 96 percent of farms in New York State, most of which are family-owned, are unable to cover the costs of paying time and a half; a threshold reduction would result in less hours for employees to work and smaller paychecks. With farms being local economic engines, this Albany mandate would have devastating effects on communities across New York State.
In a letter sent by members of the Senate Republican Conference, legislators cited a [recent study](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TpO8u-wiQRhJ88A-GU_DOpNDj2xdR7FfXy9e3tjdryX62YAfNDYA4Pl8_Z3etcmoZKXUcBfHQQcUEHp9aeftUx347xG27PdI-EgTngv6jNNDLLu98XufRS7srOlbKd7L0C1mjRhOQfaxuwy_lcMW2XkOS7RX9ndGilXvClUCvck7_dpzIgI5aiXTQhtvfc1SdaPnwN1oWzp1-3UFQfUpulEZhCScwpfwXfsYfFGJg0eXVzN7BUMRrlTxCLttIlH4mJI0NRmIvIclVZDlyN_y0rmy7dk_yb1pfFCT0VXk-Bo=&c=NorzPffdN2-ZtKfjWpatrPiusm3j4QmEJh0mdVHAECaYzQ-xESG4iQ==&ch=wSojOyBV_y99pk6qzHRFkNBpi5mxT5MXzQQfDFcQzIfPbG6x2vLclA==) conducted at Cornell University. The study found that if the overtime threshold was lowered to 40 hours, two-thirds of our dairy farmers would have a negative impact on their operations, including leaving the industry or investing out of state, and half of fruit and vegetable farmers indicated they would decrease their operations or exit the industry.
---
| [Read Full Release](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TpO8u-wiQRhJ88A-GU_DOpNDj2xdR7FfXy9e3tjdryX62YAfNDYA4Pl8_Z3etcmop0CXF31g19W2BtNGh_EfKCT82jI9QsbMQap4WmqIgUp9rqdsYQodGIn7pEOnV2ZHKtq0Gis_2vr1y0u8UOOJIFECjdqbK2FLSk1MmsFDG_1Hr6wBuRN_gUnvwkWgnVBAUT1Z9ZZDRZHv8cxSPYM0--cX3d07g1xtEZsBWppigiskcnBh98BPrw==&c=NorzPffdN2-ZtKfjWpatrPiusm3j4QmEJh0mdVHAECaYzQ-xESG4iQ==&ch=wSojOyBV_y99pk6qzHRFkNBpi5mxT5MXzQQfDFcQzIfPbG6x2vLclA==)
---
|
---
| |
## Senator Spotlight
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TpO8u-wiQRhJ88A-GU_DOpNDj2xdR7FfXy9e3tjdryX62YAfNDYA4Pl8_Z3etcmoFVCJOppCmU32s9Iw7GLRjTDehPq6Thxxo-dBrLS8No-LHyU3rwCeapKMuPMz29ErD8mwzE_mWyIQs9luJwpcdACScq04cZzVweiE9I6VfzE=&c=NorzPffdN2-ZtKfjWpatrPiusm3j4QmEJh0mdVHAECaYzQ-xESG4iQ==&ch=wSojOyBV_y99pk6qzHRFkNBpi5mxT5MXzQQfDFcQzIfPbG6x2vLclA==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TpO8u-wiQRhJ88A-GU_DOpNDj2xdR7FfXy9e3tjdryX62YAfNDYA4Pl8_Z3etcmoVAqShxx8hh_qywsmPEY2oLbXukrzWauDBljth3tU1iFH5OLtfjgfKcPlehtsdnH5hIURsggYWXlMZYjU5vPVTY3m_t6lNMfx&c=NorzPffdN2-ZtKfjWpatrPiusm3j4QmEJh0mdVHAECaYzQ-xESG4iQ==&ch=wSojOyBV_y99pk6qzHRFkNBpi5mxT5MXzQQfDFcQzIfPbG6x2vLclA==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TpO8u-wiQRhJ88A-GU_DOpNDj2xdR7FfXy9e3tjdryX62YAfNDYA4Pl8_Z3etcmoSgf4LPFer6KpJUdbIHvT6M3SJqCPsJm6mIipJgeBcYGkdSfpVffmfPX906P0O2dSiIa7Qe9FN4LVAem8go2uq7MGOyPstPS4574LVmV-3Ic=&c=NorzPffdN2-ZtKfjWpatrPiusm3j4QmEJh0mdVHAECaYzQ-xESG4iQ==&ch=wSojOyBV_y99pk6qzHRFkNBpi5mxT5MXzQQfDFcQzIfPbG6x2vLclA==)
---
|
### Senator Mike Martucci, SD-42
---
Senator Martucci has been a long-time advocate for third party licensing of CDL drivers, which has become a reality in New York, helping to alleviate the truck and bus driver shortage.
"As the former owner and operator of a school bus company, I have always been an advocate for New York State to allow third party administration of CDL licensing tests. With the school bus driver shortages we are experiencing this step is vital now more than ever. Last year, I even stepped in to assist my local school district as a driver because the situation had become truly desperate," said Senator Martucci.
---

clean_body: Sunday, January 16th Edition | | | | == | Weekly Newsletter | January 16, 2022 | Issue III | | | | NY Senate, Assembly Republicans, County Executive Blakeman & Law Enforcement: Restore Public Safety With Homicides & Violent Crime on the Rise all Across NY, Republicans Stand With Law Enforcement & Local Officials to Call for a Return to Common Sense Public Safety Solutions On Tuesday, Leader Rob Ortt and his colleagues in the New York State Senate, The Assembly Minority Conference, Nassau County Executive Bruce Blakeman, and members of law enforcement gathered for a press conference on their agenda to restore public safety to New York. "No New Yorker should ever feel unsafe in their homes, neighborhoods, and local communities. Regrettably, the radical extremists now running the State Legislature have placed the interests of dangerous criminals above the rights of everyone else, including crime victims, law-abiding citizens, and the dedicated law enforcement professionals who keep our communities safe. The results are painfully clear, and New Yorkers have had enough. Today, the Senate Republican conference will be introducing a hostile amendment that will repeal the discovery and bail reforms that passed in 2019 and 2020. It's time to restore common sense and public safety to our state now," said Leader Rob Ortt. | == | PRO-CRIMINAL POLICIES have resulted in a dangerous crime wave. Leader Ortt is fighting to restore common sense and public safety to New York. CLOSE the revolving door of violent criminals END cashless bail and restore judicial discretion; and * Support and defend our brave men and women in law enforcement Join the movement to restore common sense & public safety to NY by signing the petition below | Sign the Petition to Restore Public Safety to New York | Senate & Assembly Republicans Call on the Farm Laborers Wage Board To Reject Reduction of the Overtime Threshold and Save the Future of Farming in New York State On Thursday, Leader Rob Ortt held a press conference with Senators George Borrello and Ed Rath, and Assemblymen Mike Norris and Steve Hawley. The Senators and Assemblymen are advocating for NYS Farmers by urging the Farm Laborers Wage Board to vote against reducing the overtime threshold below the current 60 hours established in the Farm Laborer Fair Labor Practices Act (FLFLPA) of 2019. "The farming industry is vastly different from other work industries. Late last year, I and members of my conference sent a letter to the Farm Laborers Wage Board urging board members to vote against the reduction of the overtime threshold. Farmers here have advocated their concerns loud and clear: lowering the overtime threshold will jeopardize their livelihoods," said Leader Ortt. This month, the New York State Farm Labor Wage Board will revisit the threshold set in 2019 and make a determination on whether to lower the threshold to 40 hours. 96 percent of farms in New York State, most of which are family-owned, are unable to cover the costs of paying time and a half; a threshold reduction would result in less hours for employees to work and smaller paychecks. With farms being local economic engines, this Albany mandate would have devastating effects on communities across New York State. In a letter sent by members of the Senate Republican Conference, legislators cited a == conducted at Cornell University. The study found that if the overtime threshold was lowered to 40 hours, two-thirds of our dairy farmers would have a negative impact on their operations, including leaving the industry or investing out of state, and half of fruit and vegetable farmers indicated they would decrease their operations or exit the industry. | == | | | Senator Spotlight | | | | == == == | Senator Mike Martucci, SD-42 Senator Martucci has been a long-time advocate for third party licensing of CDL drivers, which has become a reality in New York, helping to alleviate the truck and bus driver shortage. "As the former owner and operator of a school bus company, I have always been an advocate for New York State to allow third party administration of CDL licensing tests. With the school bus driver shortages we are experiencing this step is vital now more than ever. Last year, I even stepped in to assist my local school district as a driver because the situation had become truly desperate," said Senator Martucci. | == | | | | Follow Rob Ortt on Social Media: == == == | | | PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR SENATE | | | | | | | Ortt for State Senate | PO Box 1279, North Tonawanda, NY 14120 | | Sent by mailto:rob@robortt.com in collaboration with |

name: First Lady Casey DeSantis
subject: Freedom is Prevailing in Florida
body:
I am grateful every single day to live in Florida. Thanks to the leadership of our great governor and my husband, Ron DeSantis,
_Sponsored message_
[****](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zq1g14r14gpkrbcnmitah04jvl4e9jp0tl6juev8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj62ob2c5h2bs)
Friend,
I am grateful every single day to live in Florida. Thanks to the leadership of our great governor and my husband, Ron DeSantis, **Florida is the freest state in the United States.**
[**CHIP IN $20.22 TO HELP GOVERNOR DESANTIS CONTINUE THE FIGHT FOR FLORIDA >>>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zon2jcqd1ua6dlaghtvsgisi8fokv7s6st73qafg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj62ob2c5h2bs)
But across the country, that freedom has come under assault as politicians have cast aside their citizens' liberty. Thankfully, Florida has a governor who stands courageously in the face of sharp opposition to protect our freedom. Thanks to his leadership, Floridians have a right to earn a living without heavy-handed mandates and kids have an opportunity to thrive.
Over the last three years, Governor DeSantis led Florida to record-breaking economic success, which has become the envy of America. Our tax burden is the lowest per capita in the nation, our job growth far outpaces the national average, we are leading the nation in business formations, and our tourism industry is soaring even beyond its pre-pandemic levels. Despite this, federal policies are creating negative headwinds. To that end, Governor DeSantis has proposed a $1 billion gas tax holiday to help Floridians combat rising inflation and gas prices.
With politicians in Democrat-controlled cities and states AGAIN making the disastrous decision to close schools, our governor continues to stand strong for parents and students to keep schools open! We have a governor who is committed to protecting parental rights -- he believes parents must have a say in their child's education, from the curriculum to the decision to vaccinate their child against COVID.
[**CHIP IN TO HELP GOVERNOR DESANTIS KEEP FLORIDA FREE!**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zeo7otl7cjt43kq2su1bc7fhqtksuol2ap4dm3hg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj62ob2c5h2bs "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/freedom-is-prevailing-fl-hf")
Governor DeSantis has banned Critical Race Theory in our schools. He believes that if a child is subjected to any hateful or discriminating propaganda in school, parents should have legal recourse.
As a husband and father, he knows the importance of keeping our communities safe, which is why he has made it clear that Florida stands for law and order. In addition to the $1,000 bonus checks he awarded to first responders last year, he's calling on the legislature to not only issue another round of bonuses this year but to increase pay for state law enforcement by up to 25% and to provide $5,000 bonuses for new officers, including those already serving in other states who want to relocate to Florida.
Keeping our communities safe also requires enforcing our border laws. With the federal government's indifference towards enforcing the rule of law, our governor is taking action. Governor DeSantis banned sanctuary cities and was the first governor to send reinforcements to Texas to help combat the surge taking place at our southern border. He's fought to stop clandestine flights that drop off illegal immigrants in Florida. He is also introducing proposals to stop these relocation efforts and is hold those who help facilitate such underhanded policies accountable.
He understands that enforcing a strong border means protecting our communities by keeping drugs off our streets and out of our children's hands, and he refuses to allow the federal government's human smuggling operation to go on unchallenged. Florida's citizens shouldn't be forced to bear the burden of the federal government's immigration ineptitude.
Florida counted over 11 million ballots on Election Day. Other states took days, if not weeks, to return ballots, ultimately casting doubt on the integrity of our electoral process. To ensure Florida continues to lead, Governor DeSantis banned "Zuckerbucks," ballot harvesting, the mass sending of mail-in ballots and he strengthened our voter ID laws. He's prepared to take additional measures this legislative session to further ensure Floridians have confidence in our election systems.
Florida is in a better place today because of our governor, but his work isn't finished. With an election coming up this November, I know that with your support, together we can continue building upon the rock of freedom Florida has become.
Get ready, Florida - ** _Governor DeSantis has only just begun to fight for you._**
[**Please rush in a contribution to help us continue to hold the line and keep Florida free. Chip in $20.22, $30, or $50 now!**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5e1l02jfa4g73dqmvd41o5npdencm18heeit958_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj62ob2c5h2bs)
Sincerely,
Casey DeSantis

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zhft9reidhf9oog92omrt16kroc870afpqlilsso_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj62ob2c5h2bs "CHIP IN NOW") [CHIP IN NOW](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9kaoqgm8h0cuj75k3v18keceu0vuiq4pcnjgjs0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj62ob2c5h2bs)
---

Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor

Ron DeSantis for Governor | 301 W. Platt Street, Suite 345, Tampa, FL 33606

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, [please use this preferences page](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/prefs/9z2zc85aafoneriqq2pa0jnnh0vqerc95njde9ek0so).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3u6he4rna12edduv7cfh0o9asq9lfn3672vcra8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj62ob2c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Please forgive me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Friend, please excuse how blunt I’m about to be, but desperate times call for desperate measures. Listen...
|
---
| | Friend, please excuse how blunt I’m about to be, but desperate times call for desperate measures. Listen... | | _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---

Friend, please excuse how blunt I'm about to be, but desperate times call for desperate measures. Listen...

I've begged.
I've pleaded.
I've humbly asked.
I've even listed out the stakes - I'm the most vulnerable Republican Senator running for re-election, my race will determine control of the Senate.

_**All this - and you STILL haven 't stepped up.**_

Maybe you haven't stepped up because you think Florida is a shoo-in but that couldn't be further from the truth. Florida's last Senate election went to a recount and Republicans BARELY won. My race is virtually tied, Friend, I'm depending on you...

I'll ask one more time, can I count on you? I really **really** need this year to start off strong.

**[SEND DESPERATELY NEEDED HELP>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3aon5eqmbh0su84cduovmpv14egekopn2qts038_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj66oj4cdh2bs)**

Thank you for your support,

Marco Rubio
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlhal8h099qhia47oq4u326i1gr1d22tge8mm098_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj66oj4cdh2bs "MarcoRubioFooter")
---
| _A personal note from Marco Rubio_ :

Friend, did you see what my former Trump Impeachment Manager opponent said about our race?

Demings is a do-nothing Democrat with a laughable record. Schumer and his cronies are propping her up with their multi-million dollar warchests all because they know she'll be a RUBBER STAMP for their radical agenda. If we let up and the Democrats win in Florida, they will KEEP control of the Senate and continue to force their dangerous agenda through Congress.

It is up to us to stop this, Friend. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

Marco Rubio

name: American Defense News
subject: Don’t let them “cancel” American history
body:
I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hill
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk1qjs300u1rt8j0gje8ajkokfql9kegrvclki60_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr3bcri6ioe8chkmgorctbjc5pb2t74e1j63d1ke6r3edbkcdgb5cb2c5hb4srgcv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lgb6phgear6cd70mdgmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5h6cpj3c9h64oh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr4kvli3d7asldrgm9g643l5h3gmoqhsooreuslo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj66oj2c9h2bs) Friend of Liberty, I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hillsdale College campus. These beautiful cards include _George Washington_ and _Thomas Jefferson_ ... _Abraham Lincoln_ and _Frederick Douglass_ ... _Winston Churchill_ , _Margaret Thatcher_ , and _Ronald Reagan_. _All of these statues stand proudly on Hillsdale’s Michigan campus_ —one of the only institutions of higher learning that refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. You can view the cards at this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk95hjuko2scveebsjf4j7b9fb0ngkqaphup9ja0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj66oj2c9h2bs)** Let the cards serve as a reminder to you of the vigilance and commitment needed to defend liberty—especially right now, a critical time for our country. **Sadly, several recent polls and events around the country show that increasing numbers of young Americans are being drawn to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty.** And the unrest in communities nationwide, where statues of our Founding Fathers are being vandalized or torn down, is another symptom of this underlying disease. What explains this development? As an educator and president of Hillsdale, I’ve been thinking about this for a long time. Here’s one primary reason... For decades, the “progressive” leftist academics who became dominant in most of America’s colleges and universities after the 1960s have been teaching a **biased** and **distorted** view of American history. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is a prime example. According to the “1619 Project,” the key to understanding America is not freedom, but slavery—and the Project’s main goal is to inject this false teaching into the curricula of America’s K–12 schools. Imagine young minds in classrooms all over American learning this. Does it make you as concerned as it does me? And given this trend in American education, is it any wonder that our young people feel less of a patriotic attachment to our nation and are increasingly attracted—out of ignorance—to failed ideas such as socialism, ideas that are destructive of liberty? Another sign of the “progressive” Left’s influence is the continuing attempt to erase our American heritage by destroying monuments, renaming schools and streets, and censoring works of literature in the name of “political correctness.” The Left knows that it cannot remake society according to its ever-evolving idea of “progress” until it has “canceled” patriotism and hallowed out the idea that we should be grateful for our blessings to the great men and women of the past—many of whom are depicted on the cards I’d like to send you. **This is why we are engaging the Left on the battlefield of education ... and why your generous support is needed right away.** After all, those on the Left are extremely well-funded, thanks to liberal billionaires like George Soros and his ilk. **With the support of citizens like you—citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty—we are ramping up its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially to our nation’s youth.** It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project” that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America’s great heritage of liberty. **Your generous support today will...**
* **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of I _mprimis_ ...for life).
* **Send** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution.
* **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale’s free online courses such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”
* **Launch** and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens.

One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding—even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. **With a gift of $17.76 or more today to support educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions, Hillsdale will send you a special notecard set featuring the statues on our “Liberty Walk.” The cards are a thank you for your support.** Supplies are limited, so please make your best tax-deductible gift right away. **You can view the cards and give your best tax-deductible gift of $17.76, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more by following the secure link below:** **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zihtmjv18ai83b8pmn938tnqkdorcv5ple8npo1g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj66oj2c9h2bs)** After receiving your notecards, I hope you’ll send one to a young person you know, encouraging them to learn more about the Constitution and American history. You can even recommend that they take advantage of Hillsdale’s many free educational resources. The Left is going all out, as illustrated by _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” It is urgent that we engage forcefully on the battlefield of education ... which is why your support is needed today. **Because as always, our only sure defense is an educated citizenry prepared to defend liberty—no matter the cost.** Warm regards, Bill Gray Associate Vice President, National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

---

name: First Lady Casey DeSantis
subject: Freedom is Prevailing in Florida
body:
I am grateful every single day to live in Florida. Thanks to the leadership of our great governor and my husband, Ron DeSantis,
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm2ikedtc2i58rq5ufud594nk5dl4qccstrth2eg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj66oj2chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onjm6on6oj3ckq38djncor60pjie4qe4t3he1p7ed3jmdob0sr6muom1oj7csomfduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4cj661pb6or7map6cc5gm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
[****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z446nrkda0h01sao0o7h5eejmoq0p4k0loi9q668_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj66oj2chh2bs)
Friend,
I am grateful every single day to live in Florida. Thanks to the leadership of our great governor and my husband, Ron DeSantis, **Florida is the freest state in the United States.**
[**CHIP IN $20.22 TO HELP GOVERNOR DESANTIS CONTINUE THE FIGHT FOR FLORIDA >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zscndbvlojk62vuh8qtlk8a30foms9q51pgi3i30_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj66oj2chh2bs)
But across the country, that freedom has come under assault as politicians have cast aside their citizens' liberty. Thankfully, Florida has a governor who stands courageously in the face of sharp opposition to protect our freedom. Thanks to his leadership, Floridians have a right to earn a living without heavy-handed mandates and kids have an opportunity to thrive.
Over the last three years, Governor DeSantis led Florida to record-breaking economic success, which has become the envy of America. Our tax burden is the lowest per capita in the nation, our job growth far outpaces the national average, we are leading the nation in business formations, and our tourism industry is soaring even beyond its pre-pandemic levels. Despite this, federal policies are creating negative headwinds. To that end, Governor DeSantis has proposed a $1 billion gas tax holiday to help Floridians combat rising inflation and gas prices.
With politicians in Democrat-controlled cities and states AGAIN making the disastrous decision to close schools, our governor continues to stand strong for parents and students to keep schools open! We have a governor who is committed to protecting parental rights -- he believes parents must have a say in their child's education, from the curriculum to the decision to vaccinate their child against COVID.
[**CHIP IN TO HELP GOVERNOR DESANTIS KEEP FLORIDA FREE!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv0f3842i98fters8gggsfbgjc3625n5e4vu1n90_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj66oj2chh2bs "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/freedom-is-prevailing-fl-rvs-pa?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pa_gopp&utm_tc=GOPP-20220116")
Governor DeSantis has banned Critical Race Theory in our schools. He believes that if a child is subjected to any hateful or discriminating propaganda in school, parents should have legal recourse.
As a husband and father, he knows the importance of keeping our communities safe, which is why he has made it clear that Florida stands for law and order. In addition to the $1,000 bonus checks he awarded to first responders last year, he's calling on the legislature to not only issue another round of bonuses this year but to increase pay for state law enforcement by up to 25% and to provide $5,000 bonuses for new officers, including those already serving in other states who want to relocate to Florida.
Keeping our communities safe also requires enforcing our border laws. With the federal government's indifference towards enforcing the rule of law, our governor is taking action. Governor DeSantis banned sanctuary cities and was the first governor to send reinforcements to Texas to help combat the surge taking place at our southern border. He's fought to stop clandestine flights that drop off illegal immigrants in Florida. He is also introducing proposals to stop these relocation efforts and is hold those who help facilitate such underhanded policies accountable.
He understands that enforcing a strong border means protecting our communities by keeping drugs off our streets and out of our children's hands, and he refuses to allow the federal government's human smuggling operation to go on unchallenged. Florida's citizens shouldn't be forced to bear the burden of the federal government's immigration ineptitude.
Florida counted over 11 million ballots on Election Day. Other states took days, if not weeks, to return ballots, ultimately casting doubt on the integrity of our electoral process. To ensure Florida continues to lead, Governor DeSantis banned "Zuckerbucks," ballot harvesting, the mass sending of mail-in ballots and he strengthened our voter ID laws. He's prepared to take additional measures this legislative session to further ensure Floridians have confidence in our election systems.
Florida is in a better place today because of our governor, but his work isn't finished. With an election coming up this November, I know that with your support, together we can continue building upon the rock of freedom Florida has become.
Get ready, Florida - ** _Governor DeSantis has only just begun to fight for you._**
[**Please rush in a contribution to help us continue to hold the line and keep Florida free. Chip in $20.22, $30, or $50 now!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc9jvm00uqs9riitohdsnb16v8k4mqokeqjq5gtg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj66oj2chh2bs)
Sincerely,
Casey DeSantis

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2aiol5rcptnfkeorbbuat26u5g688a6kfpub69o_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj66oj2chh2bs "CHIP IN NOW") [CHIP IN NOW](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zibp5l702ei1em4crlmsgq1qll7jvrg6cgn3s47o_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj66oj2chh2bs)
---

Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor

Ron DeSantis for Governor | 301 W. Platt Street, Suite 345, Tampa, FL 33606

name: Great America Update
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6766%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=JAe38knJtxSkNt%2fkVp2Pdg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69637%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=enhJ%2ferFtI00KGPdKwS%2fWg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69638%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=h8Blo6VRPTaRgn8wKdNH3w&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69639%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ydl%2fPSvl2MBAU9puxZtSXA&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” Through “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,” you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Don’t let them “cancel” American history
body:
I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hill
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zj57soqrq7h2nethroghmbqm60ntibracb1csm4o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uqqn8c9gmhg74t1hmpjm2cjjeiqbbdj1chh79cjkemqr2db665hj5crmm5jj8dpnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlc2pmcc3im1j78oljc5jr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1c9j6co70cph649fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zt844t0hqtbihl3ek2ltvfhru39ivnmpv80ku5no_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj61o36c9h2bs) Friend of Liberty, I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hillsdale College campus. These beautiful cards include _George Washington_ and _Thomas Jefferson_ ... _Abraham Lincoln_ and _Frederick Douglass_ ... _Winston Churchill_ , _Margaret Thatcher_ , and _Ronald Reagan_. _All of these statues stand proudly on Hillsdale’s Michigan campus_ —one of the only institutions of higher learning that refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. You can view the cards at this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7s5svpgrm2qdsscgtidrivu10c1a8abg1kch8q0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj61o36c9h2bs)** Let the cards serve as a reminder to you of the vigilance and commitment needed to defend liberty—especially right now, a critical time for our country. **Sadly, several recent polls and events around the country show that increasing numbers of young Americans are being drawn to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty.** And the unrest in communities nationwide, where statues of our Founding Fathers are being vandalized or torn down, is another symptom of this underlying disease. What explains this development? As an educator and president of Hillsdale, I’ve been thinking about this for a long time. Here’s one primary reason... For decades, the “progressive” leftist academics who became dominant in most of America’s colleges and universities after the 1960s have been teaching a **biased** and **distorted** view of American history. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is a prime example. According to the “1619 Project,” the key to understanding America is not freedom, but slavery—and the Project’s main goal is to inject this false teaching into the curricula of America’s K–12 schools. Imagine young minds in classrooms all over American learning this. Does it make you as concerned as it does me? And given this trend in American education, is it any wonder that our young people feel less of a patriotic attachment to our nation and are increasingly attracted—out of ignorance—to failed ideas such as socialism, ideas that are destructive of liberty? Another sign of the “progressive” Left’s influence is the continuing attempt to erase our American heritage by destroying monuments, renaming schools and streets, and censoring works of literature in the name of “political correctness.” The Left knows that it cannot remake society according to its ever-evolving idea of “progress” until it has “canceled” patriotism and hallowed out the idea that we should be grateful for our blessings to the great men and women of the past—many of whom are depicted on the cards I’d like to send you. **This is why we are engaging the Left on the battlefield of education ... and why your generous support is needed right away.** After all, those on the Left are extremely well-funded, thanks to liberal billionaires like George Soros and his ilk. **With the support of citizens like you—citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty—we are ramping up its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially to our nation’s youth.** It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project” that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America’s great heritage of liberty. **Your generous support today will...**
* **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of I _mprimis_ ...for life).
* **Send** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution.
* **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale’s free online courses such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”
* **Launch** and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens.

One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding—even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. **With a gift of $17.76 or more today to support educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions, Hillsdale will send you a special notecard set featuring the statues on our “Liberty Walk.” The cards are a thank you for your support.** Supplies are limited, so please make your best tax-deductible gift right away. **You can view the cards and give your best tax-deductible gift of $17.76, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more by following the secure link below:** **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z883pk6gqn8gdve5c5ip6fn4gi4ehqjiocri8pd0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpj61o36c9h2bs)** After receiving your notecards, I hope you’ll send one to a young person you know, encouraging them to learn more about the Constitution and American history. You can even recommend that they take advantage of Hillsdale’s many free educational resources. The Left is going all out, as illustrated by _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” It is urgent that we engage forcefully on the battlefield of education ... which is why your support is needed today. **Because as always, our only sure defense is an educated citizenry prepared to defend liberty—no matter the cost.** Warm regards, Bill Gray Associate Vice President, National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

Hillsdale College,33 East College St, Hillsdale, MI, 49242, USA
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2z6ueqt6nos0do3pif755vejjupband3kutlfm7m8).

Increase the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale’s free online courses such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.” Launch and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens. One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding—even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. With a gift of $17.76 or more today to support educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions, Hillsdale will send you a special notecard set featuring the statues on our “Liberty Walk.” The cards are a thank you for your support. Supplies are limited, so please make your best tax-deductible gift right away. You can view the cards and give your best tax-deductible gift of $17.76, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more by following the secure link below: After receiving your notecards, I hope you’ll send one to a young person you know, encouraging them to learn more about the Constitution and American history. You can even recommend that they take advantage of Hillsdale’s many free educational resources. The Left is going all out, as illustrated by The New York Times’ “1619 Project.” It is urgent that we engage forcefully on the battlefield of education ... which is why your support is needed today. Because as always, our only sure defense is an educated citizenry prepared to defend liberty—no matter the cost. Warm regards, Bill Gray Associate Vice President, National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Hillsdale College,33 East College St, Hillsdale, MI, 49242, USA If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Hello,
Yesterday we faced our first mid-month deadline of the year. **I’m happy to report that thousands of grassroots donors like you pushed us over our $100,000 goal. Thank you.**
These goals and these deadlines are very real. We are running an efficient, streamlined, and issues-based campaign powered by grassroots donors like you. Iowa and I are counting on people like you.
Your support is crucial. I’m running for the U.S. Senate to represent people like my folks – everyday hardworking Iowans. My focus is on the voters here in Iowa and like-minded people like my folks, not the big bucks from a Super PAC.

_Ruth and Joe Franken, Lebanon, Iowa, circa 1947_
If we’re going to take on Big Pharma, rein in Wall Street, address the climate crisis, and actually pass progressive legislation, we must protect (and expand!) our Democratic majority in the Senate. That starts with defeating Chuck Grassley and turning Iowa blue this November.
I’m so grateful to have you on the team.
Thank you again,
Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)

body:

---

Folks,

I’m a little embarrassed. You know my parents always taught me to be grateful, not ask for too much, and thank those who were nice enough to give me a gift. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in 2021 made me happier than a penguin in an ice chest.

**Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left’s agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting.** I couldn’t do it without you. That’s why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in 2021, but there’s just too much on the line not to ask.

I missed my 2021 fundraising goals, and my Radical Left opponents noticed. They’ve not only taken notice, but they’re taking action. They’ve called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat me in 2022 and push their Socialist Agenda. This can’t happen.

**I NEED YOUR HELP. I’M HUMBLY ASKING.**
The only way we’re going to save America, Take Back the Senate, and stop the Left’s Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We’ve got to start 2022 off right, and I’m hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below.

| [**RUSH $25**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4da1252qhfsgr5it386j8i0upud7lhclpqrec5g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpgm8or0slh2bs)

---
[**RUSH $250**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6rfndlp120s5uglp18lagncf1ln5bt8939mb0f8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpgm8or0slh2bs)
---
[**RUSH $500**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhmr91mhds2cahkgntp6d6p1ukerui7m7c0d88ao_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpgm8or0slh2bs)

I appreciate your understanding, and I hope you’ll help me catch up.

Thank you,

subject: Crist & DeSantis NECK-AND-NECK!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
Last time around, DeSantis only won by less than half a point. |
---

| | URGENT: In order to flip Florida blue we MUST defeat Ron DeSantis and elect Charlie Crist this November!

**[We CANNOT let DeSantis use a second term as a stepping stone to the White House. Will you please pitch in anything you can right away to help Charlie win this race and flip Florida BLUE on Election Day?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40740093/325711877/-663416480?refcode=20220116_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTcyMDM3Ny1kOTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F27PfypsBHGVb0zoGp5B9f2v7HbVgnIJw1FbbuR0iuQ=)** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40740094/325711878/-663416480?refcode=20220116_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTcyMDM3Ny1kOTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F27PfypsBHGVb0zoGp5B9f2v7HbVgnIJw1FbbuR0iuQ=)
---
As Charlie has said, Ron DeSantis doesn’t care about people. He cares about securing the Republican nomination for president in 2024. While COVID-19 cases skyrocketed, Gov. DeSantis let a stockpile of 1 million COVID-19 tests expire.

DeSantis is soft on COVID and more concerned with restricting a woman’s right to choose and suppressing voting rights than he is with protecting Florida from the impending threat of climate change. **If he wins another term, things will only get worse -- which is why we MUST elect Charlie this November!**

The good news is that _Insider Elections_ calls this race a **“battleground,”** and last time around, DeSantis only won by **less than half a point**. Victory is well within reach, but we need to keep building a winning grassroots movement to get the job done!

**That’s why we’re coming to you, friend. Ron DeSantis has far-right billionaires from out of state bankrolling his campaign, and we’re counting on YOU to help us fight back. Can we count on your support right now to help Charlie flip Florida BLUE?**

**[Please, if you can, pitch in any amount right now to help us keep building a winning grassroots campaign. Every amount, no matter how small, will add up to make a BIG difference and help Charlie DEFEAT Ron DeSantis this November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40740095/325711879/-663416480?refcode=20220116_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTcyMDM3Ny1kOTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F27PfypsBHGVb0zoGp5B9f2v7HbVgnIJw1FbbuR0iuQ=)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40740102/325711887/-663416480?refcode=20220116_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTcyMDM3Ny1kOTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F27PfypsBHGVb0zoGp5B9f2v7HbVgnIJw1FbbuR0iuQ=)
---
I wanted to write to say thank you for everything you’re doing to help defeat Ron DeSantis. Florida can’t afford another four years of his divisive politics in the governor’s office, and I appreciate your support in this race.

Whether we have a governor who will fight climate change, protect our communities from COVID, and defend our most precious constitutional rights will depend on the outcome of this election. Governor DeSantis wants to use the governor’s office to advance an extreme, far-right agenda that he thinks will help him win the Republican nomination for president, and we can’t let that happen.
