# #1 Survival Item of 2022
**This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less
Than 48 Hours – Now It's Finally Back in Stock**[**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-_Lzw)[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._M7nLA)[**People are buying these in 4 packs – Learn More**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._PYvXToS88OA) Oh no. We slapped our foreheads.We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it.The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours.The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand.And then... poof!GONE!Our inventory manager was asking..._**"Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?"**_ Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow!And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now.That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you:[**Tested by Former Navy SEAL:
A Pocket Power Plant That's Weather-Resistant, Has An Ultra-Bright LED Flashlight And Charges 2 Devices At Once!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-nJ9qdZNL963ycw)[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-WHQ)| | **Melanie D.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.
---|---
| **Shirley C.** I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.
---|---
| **Wing C.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that – to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world – it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.
---|---
| **Richard G.** It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.
---|---
[**Click here to see it in action!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._XfKmRDQ)
Featured reviews are from real customers. Sometimes customers are given a free product to test, or received a free product as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. subject: Tell Your Senators to oppose this law >>
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell your Senators: "Antitrust Laws Should Protect Consumers, Not Hurt Them!" >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T534a5440-9112-46b0-9aa4-3f0b6a608a50/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3d02c023-ccc0-4d0e-b48b-c4e32037398e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | A bill introduced by Republican Senator Grassley, the American Innovation and Choice Online Act (S. 2992), is getting closer to a vote in the Senate. And while we support greater enforcement of antitrust laws, **[we need to tell Congress to make sure new laws help consumers and don't hurt them.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8e24eec0-3b14-4133-bca3-2acfcca123af/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** The way it is written, S. 2992 could hurt consumers by impacting the convenience and quality of tech services they use every day. Effectively, this legislation could break Amazon Prime’s two-day shipping model and could stop Google from listing Google Maps and store reviews in search results. The bill could also remove iMessage, FaceTime, and Apple Music from being pre-downloaded apps on the iPhone, and much more. **Congress needs to act, but it needs to act carefully. ** [Tell your Senators to support antitrust enforcement that doesn't sacrifice the tools and innovations we relied on during the pandemic – email your Senators now >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tee5a7d3b-f30a-4065-9bdf-9eedcab63170/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
| The future of healthcare, our economy, voting rights, AND the House majority are all on the chopping block if Republicans continue to play politics with our congressional lines.

Republicans are trying to do whatever it takes to keep Democrats out of power and rig congressional maps. Now, the Ohio Supreme Court has ruled the preliminary congressional maps unconstitutional and we have a fighting chance at making sure our redrawn maps are fair for all voters in the state.

But the thing is, team: Republicans won't stop playing every dirty trick in the book to get their way, so we have to fight back before the maps are redrawn.

Ohioans have already seen what happens when Republicans control map making; that's why they made their voices heard and demanded a say in the Ohio redistricting process.

[**We're fighting to protect free and fair elections in Ohio. Chip in $5 or more to help us hit our mid-month fundraising goal before tonight's deadline. Every dollar helps us fight for fair election maps.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40745030/325730121/1636697581?refcode=em22_220116_mm4_fnd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220116_mm4_fnd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTEyYzcyNS1lMTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1aMydHt_oNwWDAkIqdU2Xk-cgCqhq9uBxlJrYbOyO3o=)

Now, the Ohio Supreme Court has ruled the preliminary congressional maps unconstitutional and we have a fighting chance at making sure our redrawn maps are fair for all voters in the state. But the thing is, team: Republicans won't stop playing every dirty trick in the book to get their way, so we have to fight back before the maps are redrawn. Ohioans have already seen what happens when Republicans control map making; that's why they made their voices heard and demanded a say in the Ohio redistricting process. = Thank you, Team ODP The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. We have the chance to flip not only Ohio's open US Senate seat, but to elect a Democratic governor as well. Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio. = | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Ohio Democratic Party 340 E Fulton St Columbus, OH 43215 United States | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

name: Marcus Flowers
subject: I’m running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene. Will you join me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
My name is Marcus Flowers and I am running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common-sense to our political discourse.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40746212/325735654/-1282350553?refcode=220113-ALS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWZjYTExMy1lNTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YCDLlVrYSo6iskNWmlEBeiDLsDpcVHHxH8NsKaLAnsc=) Friend, My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common-sense to our political discourse. As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the radical-right hijack the phrase patriotism to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. **Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race.** [**Over the next few weeks, I hope to earn your support on this next mission. To learn a bit more about me, and why I got in this race -- I’m asking you to click below to watch my launch video.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40746213/325735655/-933959632?refcode=220116_mf_onboarding&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWZjYTExMy1lNTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YCDLlVrYSo6iskNWmlEBeiDLsDpcVHHxH8NsKaLAnsc=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40746214/325735656/-933959632?refcode=220116_mf_onboarding&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWZjYTExMy1lNTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YCDLlVrYSo6iskNWmlEBeiDLsDpcVHHxH8NsKaLAnsc=) **Now, let’s not kid ourselves: the battle to unseat Greene will be difficult.** She is the new darling of the Radical Right media machine -- and she’s backed by millions in special-interest money. But one thing I’ve learned throughout my career in service is that when the mission is this important, you have to stay focused. **[If you believe that Greene is unfit to serve and that Georgia deserves better -- chip in now to help us start this campaign off on the right foot. A donation of $25, $50, or $100 will go such a long way in ensuring that we can defeat hatred in our own community.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40746215/325735657/-933959632?refcode=220116_mf_onboarding&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWZjYTExMy1lNTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YCDLlVrYSo6iskNWmlEBeiDLsDpcVHHxH8NsKaLAnsc=)** Together we can accomplish great things,
Marcus Flowers | Marcus Flowers is a Democrat running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene. As an Army Veteran, Marcus understands the true meaning of service and patriotism and will work tirelessly to defeat the hatred of the alt-right. **This election is going to be tough, but with the help of grassroots donors like you -- anything is possible.** | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40746216/325735658/-933959632?refcode=220116_mf_onboarding&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWZjYTExMy1lNTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YCDLlVrYSo6iskNWmlEBeiDLsDpcVHHxH8NsKaLAnsc=)

name: Dr. Gillian Battino
subject: The truth about “call time”...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Battino for U
body:
An ugly part of campaigns | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40746771/325738886/464806879?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmFiN2Y3NC1lNjc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WyDXJWqfGnxE1dJOu1Lqhz9yM54ChXPn4emPiU-pKkA=&emci=2c7d2290-3675-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=8bab7f74-e676-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25515813) | Team, An ugly part of campaigns is “call time” – a.k.a. “dialing for dollars.” Candidates like me are expected to make an ungodly number of phone calls across the state and country to ask people for contributions to help run their campaigns. As a doctor (not a politician), I had no idea this was a thing until I started running! And I have to say, it can be an exhausting and demoralizing process. Folks are struggling right now. They’re tired, stressed out, distrusting, strapped for cash, busy at work, expecting a different call, or in a zoom meeting. Some are sick with COVID or facing a cancer diagnosis. Recently, I spoke with a frontline health care worker who described life during COVID, and his fatigue and stress. He was too worried about his student loan debt to donate. An elderly lady said she could donate in January after she paid for her prescriptions. These struggles are real – and this process has really made me think: _How can we elect leaders to fight for them when the 1% write fat checks to candidates who will maintain the status quo? How can candidates who represent REAL people win?_ **The answer is a robust, people-powered grassroots campaign that represents regular folks organizing for political change. Just ask Bernie or AOC...it’s possible for outsiders to win when we come together to back them.** [**That’s why I turn to you so often, team. Your grassroots support – NOT 40 hours of call time a week – is what is going to propel us to victory. So I have to ask: Can you pitch in to help us defeat the status quo and send a Senator that represents REAL people to Washington? Anything from $3 to $5 makes a difference in this campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40746772/325738887/-945847804?refcode=E13461-20220114-CallTime-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmFiN2Y3NC1lNjc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WyDXJWqfGnxE1dJOu1Lqhz9yM54ChXPn4emPiU-pKkA=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to defeat Ron Johnson and elect the first Democratic woman physician to the U.S. Senate will go through immediately:_ | **[$3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40746773/325738888/-945847804?express_lane=true&refcode=E13461-20220114-CallTime-EG-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmFiN2Y3NC1lNjc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WyDXJWqfGnxE1dJOu1Lqhz9yM54ChXPn4emPiU-pKkA=)** | **[$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40746774/325738889/-945847804?express_lane=true&refcode=E13461-20220114-CallTime-EG-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmFiN2Y3NC1lNjc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WyDXJWqfGnxE1dJOu1Lqhz9yM54ChXPn4emPiU-pKkA=)**

clean_body: An ugly part of campaigns | | Team, An ugly part of campaigns is “call time” – a.k.a. “dialing for dollars.” Candidates like me are expected to make an ungodly number of phone calls across the state and country to ask people for contributions to help run their campaigns. As a doctor (not a politician), I had no idea this was a thing until I started running! And I have to say, it can be an exhausting and demoralizing process. Folks are struggling right now. They’re tired, stressed out, distrusting, strapped for cash, busy at work, expecting a different call, or in a zoom meeting. Some are sick with COVID or facing a cancer diagnosis. Recently, I spoke with a frontline health care worker who described life during COVID, and his fatigue and stress. He was too worried about his student loan debt to donate. An elderly lady said she could donate in January after she paid for her prescriptions. These struggles are real – and this process has really made me think: How can we elect leaders to fight for them when the 1% write fat checks to candidates who will maintain the status quo? How can candidates who represent REAL people win? The answer is a robust, people-powered grassroots campaign that represents regular folks organizing for political change. Just ask Bernie or AOC...it’s possible for outsiders to win when we come together to back them. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to defeat Ron Johnson and elect the first Democratic woman physician to the U.S. Senate will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Dr. Gillian Battino It’s time for a new kind of leadership in Wisconsin. name: Defeat Ron Johnson
subject: Broken promises
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin **[alexlasry
body:
Ron Johnson has only been looking out for himself and is doing everything possible to consolidate his own power in the Senate. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40747646/325742815/1691506499?refcode=EM_FR_220116FR_N_drj_90DA_7_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2I4MTNkOS1lODc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yLOLHZ4T5NLzXuJ7zelrcaxswU7YpYCoRitMePSG7F8=)

Peter,

It’s been one week since Ron Johnson announced his reelection campaign, breaking his promise to only be in the Senate for two terms.

**But Ron Johnson is no stranger to breaking his promises.**

Ron Johnson promised to fight for Wisconsin. Instead, he fought for his wealthy donor friends by pushing for a tax break for the ultra-wealthy. And his own net worth has doubled while in office.

He promised to stand up to China. Instead, he led the charge to kill the U.S. Innovation and Competition Act, a landmark piece of legislation to hold China accountable.

He promised to lower healthcare costs. Instead, he calls healthcare “a privilege” and continues to attack the Affordable Care Act.

Ron Johnson has only been looking out for himself and is doing everything possible to consolidate his own power in the Senate – **and it’s time to send him packing.**

**[Alex Lasry will fight for you and work day and night in the Senate to put money back in the pockets of hardworking Wisconsinites. clean_body: Ron Johnson has only been looking out for himself and is doing everything possible to consolidate his own power in the Senate. | | = Peter, It’s been one week since Ron Johnson announced his reelection campaign, breaking his promise to only be in the Senate for two terms. But Ron Johnson is no stranger to breaking his promises. Ron Johnson promised to fight for Wisconsin. Instead, he fought for his wealthy donor friends by pushing for a tax break for the ultra-wealthy. And his own net worth has doubled while in office. He promised to stand up to China. Instead, he led the charge to kill the U.S. Innovation and Competition Act, a landmark piece of legislation to hold China accountable. He promised to lower healthcare costs. Instead, he calls healthcare “a privilege” and continues to attack the Affordable Care Act. Ron Johnson has only been looking out for himself and is doing everything possible to consolidate his own power in the Senate – and it’s time to send him packing. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Team Lasry ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. But right now, we’re on the front lines in battleground states across the country, fighting to protect incumbents like Catherine Cortez Masto in Nevada and Raphael Warnock in Georgia. So we really can’t afford to fall short. These candidates need us in their corner if they want the best chance at winning re-election and defending our Senate majority. clean_body: | = Friends — this is not how we wanted to end our weekend but we have an update we need to share with you. We fell short of our 1,000 donation mid-month fundraising goal, meaning we’re going to have to take a hard look at our budget and make some adjustments over the next few weeks. Now usually, we can afford to fall a little short and make up for it by the end of the month. But right now, we’re on the front lines in battleground states across the country, fighting to protect incumbents like Catherine Cortez Masto in Nevada and Raphael Warnock in Georgia. So we really can’t afford to fall short. These candidates need us in their corner if they want the best chance at winning re-election and defending our Senate majority. That’s why today we are reaching out with a special goal. We want to make up for lost ground and get 250 donations TODAY. Even $5 or $10 can make a big difference, so what do you say? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = So much is on the line in the coming months. But we’re confident we can defend and expand our majority if we work together. name: Secretary Mike Pompeo
subject: I've Made A Decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
People keep asking what my plans are for the next election. Well, I've made a decision.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3apiq--fgxr-4qqlpo7&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3apiq-1tfb6-4qqlpo2/)
---

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I’m 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That’s why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I’m traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I’m staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3apiq-1tfb7-4qqlpo3/ "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

---
My time working as President Trump’s Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, I’ve actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again. That’s made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **

That’s why I am hoping you will **[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3apiq-1tfb8-4qqlpo4/ "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.")** The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3apiq-1tfb9-4qqlpo5/)
---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3apiq-1tfba-4qqlpo5/)
---

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State

---
| |

name: V. Demings (urgent)

body:
It's clearer than ever that a 50/50 Senate is not enough to make the progress we need.
| | |
---
Friend – I'm going to tell you the hard truth:
It's clearer than ever that **a 50/50 Senate is not enough** to make the progress we need.
Democrats need _one_ more vote to protect voting rights. One more vote to expand Medicare. One more vote to combat climate change, curb our gun violence epidemic and act on so many other critical issues our country is facing.
**I vow to be that vote the American people need in the Senate, but I can't do it without you.[Will you donate $5 right now to help me defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority in November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40749209/325750249/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1612-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTQxZTQ2YS1lZTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ipvDyIA9nZmqCugT7DeKvK-0cEr7w8Qcf2858HO6-I=)**
If I win this race, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to expand our Senate majority – but a recent poll shows me neck and neck with Marco Rubio, and the GOP is pouring millions of dollars into Florida to prop up Rubio and stop me from surging ahead.
If you want to expand our Senate majority and help pass Democrats' bold legislative agenda, I need you to give $5 right now to help me defeat Marco Rubio and put another Democratic vote into the U.S. Senate.
**Please, use this link to give:[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40749210/325750251/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1612-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTQxZTQ2YS1lZTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ipvDyIA9nZmqCugT7DeKvK-0cEr7w8Qcf2858HO6-I=)**
With your support, we will build back better.

Thank you,

Val Demings

subject: fwd: The sanctity of elections is on the ballot in November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chelsea Clark For Ohio 30 Garfield Place, Suite 900, Cincinnati, OH 45202
body:
Chelsea needs us now.
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40749430/325751410/1372638257?refcode=EM_FR_220116mm_MM_TC_NK_4_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDY4ODEzYy1mMDc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pirdIfpFdqaIE4Z5tdT75HgDO8U8g29xrSrlOxVCmJE=)
---

body:
Peter:

**First -** They tried to expel me not once, not twice, not three times -- but FOUR TIMES -- from Congress.

**Then -** The January 6 Witch Hunt Committee is demanding I hand over my private phone and social media records so they can leak my messages to the Fake News, drag me to court and bury me with millions of dollars in legal costs.

**Now -** Communist Democrats demanded the police throw me in handcuffs and drag me off to jail. [_**HELP MTG FIGHT BACK
CHIP IN $17.76**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59491518:WVUW8HHYN:m:1:2365227053:11A01B932108801F6C55C00EC8A11B74:r) My crime?

**Leading the America First fight to STOP the gun grabbers shredding the Second Amendment to ban and confiscate your firearms.**

It's no surprise the hate America Democrats picked now to demand police throw me in jail for opposing their radical agenda.

Chuck Schumer is scheming to trigger the nuclear option to eliminate the legislative filibuster.

Once Communist Democrats go nuclear, they will ram through legislation to **BAN, CONFISCATE and DESTROY our firearms**.

The fate of our Second Amendment rights is an all-hands-on-deck emergency, and I need to know if you are with me.

subject: quick rundown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
Read time: 35 seconds
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40750786/325757663/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk540-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzgxNTRjZC1mNjc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=czfNPHnMC3gGGBlipNPHN7D-7zNTw95BVUIV2zISDvY=)
Peter – it's Abby. Can I have just one minute of your time to ask you to make your first donation to my campaign tonight?
There are a million reasons why this campaign is worth fighting for, but let me share just a few of the ones that are most on my mind right now:
This campaign is worth fighting for because polling has revealed that 64% of likely Iowa voters do NOT want to reelect Sen. Grassley.
**This campaign is worth fighting for because, right now, Sen. Grassley is also facing a RECORD-HIGH disapproval rating.**
This campaign is worth fighting for because, after seven terms in the Senate, Sen. Grassley has left working families, like my own, behind.
This campaign is worth fighting for because I promise that nobody – _nobody –_ will work harder than I will to defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Democratic Senate majority.
I know you care about this race, and your support means the world to me. Because of your belief in my campaign, we're able to truly compete. Because of you, we're going to _defeat_ Sen. Grassley and expand our Senate majority.
But I don't want to sugarcoat things here – starting off the year on the right foot is crucial for this campaign. So, if you share in my belief that this campaign is worth fighting for, can you make a contribution right now?
**[Donate $5 or more right now to help me defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Senate majority. Every donation gets us that much closer to hitting our first fundraising deadline for the year, so please chip in whatever you can right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40750787/325757691/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk540-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzgxNTRjZC1mNjc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=czfNPHnMC3gGGBlipNPHN7D-7zNTw95BVUIV2zISDvY=)**

name: ICYMI News
subject: Don’t miss this
body:
I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsam9cf8qblvdn66moa14ci02suifjsemk1l9ke0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpim6o36cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zagocacbn2vv5ka201k55lgotllf6rvtv7h7set8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpim6o36cjh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3jf6bk77mk1jrcvq1ckhu6g63p77je0moful3i0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpim6o36cjh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Please let me explain why the response to this email matters so much
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hi there, You may have noticed a flurry of emails from me at the end of last quarter. I don't like to clutter your inbox, but my campaign was facing our biggest public fundraising deadline of the year. Pundits are saying that we could lose this Senate seat—and with it, our majority—so emails like this are crucial to raising the resources we need to win. **Before I get any further, let me ask:[Will you please make a donation of any amount to help us win in New Hampshire and protect Democrats’ fragile hold on the majority? I’ll explain more about why this matters today in a moment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40751411/325760867/-1281091919?refcode=e20220116_mwh-best&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGEyZDIyNy1mYzc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kga2Y69-3ynCdeOLzW4gXfyJK5CG-R9-FuIvo2FQOlI=)** The email below was among the most successful at bringing in contributions. While public deadlines are critical, the donations you make on a random Sunday in January help me connect with voters about the work we’ve done to make life better for hardworking families. Since I won my last race by just 1,017 votes, we need to be talking to voters each and every day — not just the big moments. I’m asking you again, because this is really important: **[Please rush $5 or whatever works for you so that we can talk to voters across the state – even in the toughest corners – so that we can keep this seat blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40751412/325760868/-1281091919?refcode=e20220116_mwh-best&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGEyZDIyNy1mYzc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kga2Y69-3ynCdeOLzW4gXfyJK5CG-R9-FuIvo2FQOlI=)** Thank you for allowing me to explain. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Keep me on the road
body:
Dear Derek,

I organized a call with our campaign leadership last week to discuss our travel over the next month. We discussed whether we need to pull down our events and meetings for the next couple of weeks, in an abundance of caution.

I thought about it. And then I said:

Find a way to keep me on the road. We’re not going to win this campaign from home.

So I write this to you from Dallas, where we are prioritizing keeping our team and those with whom we work and meet along the way safe. We’re masking, we’re vaccinated and boosted, and we’re testing.

But we’re also hustling — meeting with small business owners, local elected leaders and prospective volunteers. Bringing everyone we can find into this campaign. (I was no standout in math class, but I’ve also believed in the power of addition.)

We’re in this to win. And winning in Texas means traveling to meet the voters who will decide the outcome of this critically important election. Will you split a donation now between our campaign and CommonGood to help defeat Greg Abbott and get Texas back on the right track? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220116_CGVA_Beto]

After gathering with supporters tonight, I will be back on the road to hold similar meetings across Texas in the upcoming days.

I’ll continue to share our message about the great things we can do when we bring Texas together, like creating better jobs, investing in world class public schools and expanding Medicaid so more folks can see a doctor. And I’ll make sure that people also know that the way to achieve these goals is to take the fight to the one man who’s preventing us from achieving our potential, Greg Abbott.

I can’t phone that in. I’ve got to be there, in person, to get it done.

I hope you’ll help keep me on the road with a donation of $25 or more to our campaign and CommonGood today. It’s the right way to run and it’s the only way to win. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_beto?refcode=20220116_CGVA_Beto]

I’m grateful for your help. I couldn’t do this without you.

Beto

(This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.)

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215
If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/f1a965ae-7275-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/45b537d8-f976-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWI1MzdkOC1mOTc2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wNTM-onEvTRg59X4TDxcNGwCiyopMQ5qDGnMDYeORcs=&id=108609855 .

Former Senator Claire McCaskill just issued a dire warning on MSNBC: **Senate Democrats must URGENTLY act on voting rights – _now_.**
Republicans tried to steal the election in 2020, even encouraging an armed insurrection at the capitol. Since then, they’ve been gerrymandering districts, suppressing voters, and enacting laws that everyone from President Joe Biden to Stacey Abrams are calling Jim Crow 2.0

Senate control will likely be decided in Iowa and the early polls are showing a close race. **But if Mike Franken is going to defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate, we’re counting on grassroots donors like you now.**
**We need to raise another $12,000 today to fight back against Grassley’s corporate PAC money and McConnell’s Super PACs, but right now we’re still $7,813 short with time running out:**

Peter,

Congressman John Katko’s retirement just cemented Claudia Tenney as _the most vulnerable Republican in Upstate New York._

In 2020, her race was decided by just 109 votes. And in 2022, without Donald Trump’s coattails on the ballot for her to ride, we have a great opportunity to flip this seat blue.

Peter, all eyes are on our district now, and we need your help. **Claudia Tenney already has over $1 million in the bank and it’s not going to be an easy fight.**

| | | Fellow Conservative – I just announced my campaign for re-election.

While it might seem like now is the time to celebrate, that is not the case. I preferred to serve a final term and go home, but the state of our country is APPALLING.

The direction of America under Democrat control is worse than I could have ever imagined. This is all because of the radical Dems in Congress and Joe Biden. This campaign isn’t about winning another term - it’s about saving AMERICA.

The future of our children and grandchildren are at stake. **[Will you join me in this battle to save America, Fellow Conservative?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3aq5n-1tfjf-4qqlpo4/ "Will you join me in this battle to save America, Fellow Conservative? ")**
---

Thank you,
Ron Johnson

clean_body: | | | | We are off track. | Friend, It is our job to make sure Harriet Hageman’s campaign has the funds to DEFEAT LIZ CHENEY and elect Harriet to represent Wyoming! Tomorrow we have a call with Harriet to go over our January fundraising report. Every day we track our fundraising to ensure we hit our daily, weekly and monthly goals. Unfortunately, we are trailing behind our January Mid-Month goal. If we want to get back on track, we need you to STEP UP. As one of our TOP SUPPORTERS, we know we can count on you. But without your support, we won’t have the resources to defeat Cheney. Thank you, Hageman Finance Team | | | |

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: It's state sanctioned racism, plain and simple.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59264859:6EBCcvENC:m:1:3253819041:1DFC3D8F9A2348D896F316DAF9E0DF4B:r) Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you're thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I'll tell you why. I've seen what's happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I'm sure you have too. All over the country, teachers are brainwashing children to hate themselves and hate their country. They tell students that if they're white they're evil racists responsible for slavery, and if they're black they're helpless victims that will never accomplish anything. _It 's state sanctioned racism, plain and simple._ **And it doesn 't matter how old you are, or how long your own children have been out of school -- we all have a leg in this race.** ** ** **[Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today to help us fight the spread of Critical Race Theory and elect conservatives who care about the truth.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59264859:6EBCcvENC:m:1:3253819041:1DFC3D8F9A2348D896F316DAF9E0DF4B:r)** Because if the radical Left succeeds in brainwashing an entire generation, America won't survive. _The generation taught to hate our country from kindergarten to college will be the one that destroys it._ They will beg our leaders to strip us of our rights and freedoms until we have none left. They will run our country into the ground and create chaos and despair where we once had prosperity and excellence. **They will surrender our country to Marxism, and we may never get it back.** The sacrifices of our forefathers will have been for nothing, our wars will have been fought for nothing, and our proud history will be reduced to nothing. **[But there 's something you can do.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59264859:6EBCcvENC:m:1:3253819041:1DFC3D8F9A2348D896F316DAF9E0DF4B:r)** That's why I'm writing to you today. Because our fate isn't sealed -- yet.__But we must act now.__ My name is Ryan Girdusky and I've made it my mission to make education sane again. I created the 1776 Project Political Action Committee to do what our politicians won't and take back our schools. **I 'm going state to state and county to county targeting school board elections, campaigning and fundraising for candidates that will take a strong stance against Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project.** But I don't stand a chance without you. **[Please donate $35 or more to the 1776 Project PAC and save our schools from race-baiting, America-hating Marxists.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59264859:6EBCcvENC:m:1:3253819041:1DFC3D8F9A2348D896F316DAF9E0DF4B:r)** And make no mistake -- this isn't just a California or New York problem. **Critical Race Theory is already being taught in EVERY SINGLE state.** It's happening from coast to coast, in red, blue and purple states alike. And if we don't take action, we'll all pay the price. You and I have to take a stand NOW. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Ryan J. Girdusky [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59264859:6EBCcvENC:m:1:3253819041:1DFC3D8F9A2348D896F316DAF9E0DF4B:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59264859:6EBCcvENC:m:1:3253819041:1DFC3D8F9A2348D896F316DAF9E0DF4B:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59264859:6EBCcvENC:m:1:3253819041:1DFC3D8F9A2348D896F316DAF9E0DF4B:r) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59264859:6EBCcvENC:m:1:3253819041:1DFC3D8F9A2348D896F316DAF9E0DF4B:r)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC

name: Adam Schiff
subject: My priorities for the year
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek, As we begin a brand new year, I’m more determined than ever to protect our democracy and make progress on the policy issues most important to all Americans. In 2021, we accomplished so much necessary progress — from the _American Rescue Plan_ to the massive _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ — and I’m going to need your help to keep building on these historic measures. **[Can you take my short 2022 Priorities Survey to let me know what you think we should focus on? With voting rights, health care, child care, and climate action hanging in the balance, on top of the need to defeat this pandemic, so much is at stake. And, of course, there is the absolute imperative of holding onto control of the House and Senate in the midterms. We’ve got big issues to tackle this year and I’ll need you with me every step of the way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40752330/325766046/-554356165?contactdata=iC1%2FF2%2BmS%2BTnmibG1shsw0k1GMvzMJq3RO5JwOhES5sWg0JKXpvSBrBjghfFsFdj%2FEQ3lF%2FVmxIqFRwungfXDPWiILKIuqcseoCy4rKOF4WHmV2q07PK5mZKx5sEUAVvND5vnKotCFRAFKi42QvHV2puwLSR1ljXpQivFz7b1oM%3D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220116_PM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220116_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTU0ODgyNy0wMzc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ILx5cL8-de1_PyH8HfC17iVFZEMQ_AA5zKY35i6sv8g=&emci=b9993d9a-4975-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=fa548827-0377-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=33917617)** | | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40752331/325766047/-554356165?contactdata=iC1%2FF2%2BmS%2BTnmibG1shsw0k1GMvzMJq3RO5JwOhES5sWg0JKXpvSBrBjghfFsFdj%2FEQ3lF%2FVmxIqFRwungfXDPWiILKIuqcseoCy4rKOF4WHmV2q07PK5mZKx5sEUAVvND5vnKotCFRAFKi42QvHV2puwLSR1ljXpQivFz7b1oM%3D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220116_PM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220116_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTU0ODgyNy0wMzc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ILx5cL8-de1_PyH8HfC17iVFZEMQ_AA5zKY35i6sv8g=&emci=b9993d9a-4975-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=fa548827-0377-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=33917617)
---
2022 is ripe with possibilities. And the pressure is mounting with midterm elections looming. That means we need to finish the job of passing President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda while protecting and expanding our slim Democratic majorities.
Democratic control of the House and Senate is key to passing laws on climate action, universal health care, reproductive rights, gun safety, and more. Remember, not a single Republican voted for the _American Rescue Plan_. It’s why I’m doing everything I can to help elect new and incumbent Democrats in the House and the Senate so we can keep our country on the path to progress.
With that in mind, I’d appreciate hearing from you directly. I’m curious what your top priorities are for the year ahead so I can ensure I’m fighting for all of our best interests.

clean_body: | Derek, As we begin a brand new year, I’m more determined than ever to protect our democracy and make progress on the policy issues most important to all Americans. In 2021, we accomplished so much necessary progress — from the American Rescue Plan to the massive Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act — and I’m going to need your help to keep building on these historic measures. | | 2022 is ripe with possibilities. And the pressure is mounting with midterm elections looming. That means we need to finish the job of passing President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda while protecting and expanding our slim Democratic majorities. Democratic control of the House and Senate is key to passing laws on climate action, universal health care, reproductive rights, gun safety, and more. Remember, not a single Republican voted for the American Rescue Plan. It’s why I’m doing everything I can to help elect new and incumbent Democrats in the House and the Senate so we can keep our country on the path to progress. With that in mind, I’d appreciate hearing from you directly. I’m curious what your top priorities are for the year ahead so I can ensure I’m fighting for all of our best interests. | Thanks so much for being in this fight with me. I look forward to working together in the year ahead. — Adam Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress Schiff for Congress 150 E. Olive Ave. Suite 208 Burbank, CA 91502 United States

body:
The purpose of this letter is to inform you that your Trump Membership expired effective December 31. Despite the fact that we have sent you warnings and notices earlier, you have failed to respond, forcing us into a situation where we have no choice but to take these drastic measures. ;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3aqjo--fgxr-4qqlpo7&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

_**SERVICE NOTICE **_
**EFFECTIVE DECEMBER 31, 2021**

**Dear Fellow Conservative,

The purpose of this letter is to inform you that your Trump Membership expired effective December 31. Despite the fact that we have sent you warnings and notices earlier, you have failed to respond, forcing us into a situation where we have no choice but to take these drastic measures.

You were well aware of the consequences, and despite being warned in the past year, you have failed to alter your actions. As a result, your membership expired 5 days ago and was subsequently canceled.

However, we will allow you this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to renew your 2022 Trump membership. Failure will result in abandoning the GOP and forever losing the chance to renew your Trump Membership in the future. **

**WILL YOU CLAIM YOUR TRUMP 2022 MEMBERSHIP?**

name: Travis Brimm, CheriBeasley.com
subject: Our numbers have taken a slight dip
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
After a surge of support at the end of December, we’ve started to see a slight dip in our numbers.
#

Hey y'all,
I wanted to reach out with a quick update on our fundraising for January so far. Will you bear with me for a minute?
With Democrats united behind Cheri, it’s critical for us to take advantage of our head start on the general election. That means we set a pretty ambitious fundraising goal to kick off 2022.
But after a huge outpouring of support at the end of December, we’ve started to see a slight dip in our numbers, which has put us behind pace on our goal for January.
These things happen. But in order for us to flip this seat and send Cheri to the Senate, we need to pick up our fundraising. That’s why I’m asking:
**[Can you make a $3 donation to Cheri Beasley’s campaign for United States Senate right now? We need a surge of grassroots support today to get us on track to hit our January goal.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22?refcode=em220116-1-subs&refcode2=267.357359.SLO-F8&t=1&akid=267%2E357359%2ESLO-F8)**

Whether you’ve been with her since day one, or if you just recently joined the team, Cheri is grateful for every single member of this grassroots campaign. Thanks to you, we are well on our way toward adding a powerful voice for justice in the U.S. Senate.
Let’s go!
Travis Brimm
Campaign Manager

Hey y'all, I wanted to reach out with a quick update on our fundraising for January so far. Will you bear with me for a minute? With Democrats united behind Cheri, it’s critical for us to take advantage of our head start on the general election. That means we set a pretty ambitious fundraising goal to kick off 2022. But after a huge outpouring of support at the end of December, we’ve started to see a slight dip in our numbers, which has put us behind pace on our goal for January. These things happen. But in order for us to flip this seat and send Cheri to the Senate, we need to pick up our fundraising. That’s why I’m asking: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | Whether you’ve been with her since day one, or if you just recently joined the team, Cheri is grateful for every single member of this grassroots campaign. name: American Action News
subject: Be one of the first
body:
I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm9bekmm1b8gronu8ce3u3jkbkbr226kue1a3ua0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cphmcoj6cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjfo9cr4fe5vin4dgf6cnrqg8injtl4f4gbilquo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cphmcoj6cdh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpvptrf7hmcin3tvoc2f7k16771jbuptuadabju8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cphmcoj6cdh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

name: News Alert
subject: re: PBS is in danger.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | **URGENT: Republicans propose a new bill to ATTACK PBS' funding**

The decades-long Republican push to DESTROY PBS has reached a critical moment, and we need to know where Democrats stand -- **but we have NO RESPONSE from you on file in our live poll:**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/5133?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220116-NewsAlert-DefendPBS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220116-NewsAlert-DefendPBS-Pros-sl1&akid=2547%2E9716520%2E8I1pFm)
**Do you support keeping PBS fully funded?**
| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/5133?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220116-NewsAlert-DefendPBS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220116-NewsAlert-DefendPBS-Pros-sl1&akid=2547%2E9716520%2E8I1pFm)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/5133?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220116-NewsAlert-DefendPBS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220116-NewsAlert-DefendPBS-Pros-sl1&akid=2547%2E9716520%2E8I1pFm)
---

The GOP is going after a familiar target, team -- the Public Broadcasting Service (PBS).

A group of far-right Republicans recently introduced a bill that would **PROHIBIT** all federal funding for one of PBS' main funders, harming a network that has brought free, educational programming into American homes for generations.

But now, GOP senators are ramping up their attacks, too. Ted Cruz just called PBS programming **_“government propaganda,”_** and others are already on-record calling for defunding.

**This is the greatest threat PBS has faced in _decades_ , so we've launched a live poll to find out where Democrats stand. _We set a goal of gathering 10,000 responses by midnight, but we still haven’t heard from you!_**
**Do you support keeping PBS fully funded?**
| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/5133?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220116-NewsAlert-DefendPBS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220116-NewsAlert-DefendPBS-Pros-sl1&akid=2547%2E9716520%2E8I1pFm)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/5133?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220116-NewsAlert-DefendPBS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220116-NewsAlert-DefendPBS-Pros-sl1&akid=2547%2E9716520%2E8I1pFm)
---

name: Val Demings
subject: Friend, I just need a moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
As I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign
| | |
---
I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare.
So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate.
Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was _destined_ for something bigger.
So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader who understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win.
So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups.

It's critical that we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida.
My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40753286/325773155/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2110-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDRjYThjMy0wYjc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rDpzhQ_esR29ANzoNr75ojVKg4PDMwYG9YR7F1oo508=)**
All the best,

Val Demings
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40753287/325773156/1804727444?refcode=jtk2110-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDRjYThjMy0wYjc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rDpzhQ_esR29ANzoNr75ojVKg4PDMwYG9YR7F1oo508=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? **[Click here to donate now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40753288/325773157/1804727444?refcode=jtk2110-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDRjYThjMy0wYjc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rDpzhQ_esR29ANzoNr75ojVKg4PDMwYG9YR7F1oo508=)** If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, **[please click here to visit my campaign store.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40753289/325773158/-460395862?refcode=jtk2110-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDRjYThjMy0wYjc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rDpzhQ_esR29ANzoNr75ojVKg4PDMwYG9YR7F1oo508=&emci=45043a95-ec76-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=f04ca8c3-0b77-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=20244100)** Thank you for your continued support. | | Yesterday was my official Campaign Kickoff- and it was a "virtual" success! (Pun intended) I just wanted to extend a truly heartfelt "Thank you!" to everyone who took time out of their Saturday to attend. The Q&A section was filled with some great questions, and I couldn't get to all of them- but no worries! I can always be reached via:

* Twitter: [@bhennrich](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/39NvWg_uS/c?w=Uuf7tVj_M3Bw2HhKmZ0w0G_pVbIfhcPgHuUqxPJ6x0M.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9iaGVubnJpY2giLCJyIjoiODQ5ODQ4ZmItNzA5Mi00NWE1LTFlZGYtZDZmNmNlZmVmNjJkIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0)

body:
Team, did you get this note from Katie Hobbs earlier? We’re all doing our part here at DASS to get ready for midterms. Now, she’s asking you to do the same. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_011622_3]
Your donations directly support pro-voter candidates and resources for us to defend our Secretaries. Every dollar you can give will help us defend democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_011622_3]
Our mid-month deadline is HOURS away – the stakes are too high for us to fall short by just $1,673! Please, team, rush $20 right now and help close the gap before midnight TONIGHT! >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_011622_3]
RUSH $20 NOW >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_011622_3]
Begin forward:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_011622_3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_011622_3]
Friends,
This is Arizona Secretary of State Katie Hobbs, and I have an important message for you about our work here at DASS.

subject: Are Republican voter suppression attempts an attack on our democracy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee
body:
John wants to hear from you! | Friend, From coast to coast, and even right here in Ohio, right-wing legislators are proposing and enacting laws that _will make it harder_ for Americans to cast a ballot. We need to know how folks in your area view these anti-voter measures, friend: [Do you believe Republican voter suppression attempts are an attack on our democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40753454/325774175/-577592197?refcode=ea.8b213d44-0f77-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.8b213d44-0f77-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjIxM2Q0NC0wZjc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LYiiSF5RR4bK1vx8waxUVp8SISfTvT8DwdsVq3o7xVY=&emci=33430c56-5675-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=8b213d44-0f77-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=22604289) | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40753455/325774176/-577592197?refcode=ea.8b213d44-0f77-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.8b213d44-0f77-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjIxM2Q0NC0wZjc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LYiiSF5RR4bK1vx8waxUVp8SISfTvT8DwdsVq3o7xVY=&emci=33430c56-5675-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=8b213d44-0f77-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=22604289) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40753456/325774177/-577592197?refcode=ea.8b213d44-0f77-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.8b213d44-0f77-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjIxM2Q0NC0wZjc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LYiiSF5RR4bK1vx8waxUVp8SISfTvT8DwdsVq3o7xVY=&emci=33430c56-5675-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=8b213d44-0f77-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=22604289)
---|---
**Look, our democracy is founded on the idea that the people should choose our leaders and decide the direction of our government.** By restricting who gets to cast a ballot (and gerrymandering district lines so that Democrats don’t have a chance), the GOP is fundamentally undermining that foundational principle.
[Please, let John know where you stand on this critical issue. Take our poll on Republican voter suppression attempts now >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40753457/325774178/-577592197?refcode=ea.8b213d44-0f77-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.8b213d44-0f77-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjIxM2Q0NC0wZjc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LYiiSF5RR4bK1vx8waxUVp8SISfTvT8DwdsVq3o7xVY=&emci=33430c56-5675-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=8b213d44-0f77-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=22604289)

The Cranley-Fedor Team

Talk soon,
Marcus Flowers

Before we break for the weekend, we wanted to take this opportunity to give you a few updates directly from campaign HQ. **» We're mounting a serious campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy.** Local voters are beginning to realize that while McCarthy defends the likes of Matt Gaetz and Marjorie Taylor Greene, our community suffers. CA-20 is one of the poorest regions in the state, and McCarthy isn't doing a damn thing about it.

**» McCarthy is blanketing our community with misleading information about his record, but he can't hide from the truth.** He’s so desperate to become Speaker that he's now threatening to punish any Democrat who tried to hold Trump and his cronies accountable. He's also blocking the Jan. 6th investigation. _That’s the real McCarthy._

**» In response, our team is ramping up our field efforts.** We're hiring bilingual canvassers and sending out mailers of our own so local voters know Marisa is the viable Democrat running against him. But we need some help: [**We still need 401 donations before midnight to fully fund our grassroots operation to CRUSH Kevin McCarthy. Can you chip in $3 right away? name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: BREAKING NEWS - US Supreme Court strikes down President Biden's private employer vaccine mandate!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts
body:
Please join me in supporting rights and freedoms for all Massachusetts citizens.
| | | |
---
---
---
|
---
Dear Friend,
GREAT NEWS!
Earlier this afternoon, the United States Supreme Court sided with individual rights and liberty and struck down President Biden's vaccine mandate for private employers.
This is a tremendous victory for the American people, not to mention a positive step for our state's economic recovery. The Democrats' progressive agenda is obviously in complete disarray!
Here in Massachusetts, I have been consistent in my opposition to egregious government mandates that wrongfully take away the freedoms of our citizens.
The government does not have the right to mandate that citizens submit to medical treatment they do not approve of as a condition of their employment in a free and open society. Too many people, including many first responders and health care providers, have already lost their jobs and their livelihoods due to such mandates, and it's wrong.
I will continue to fight for individual rights and to oppose draconian government mandates throughout my campaign for Governor.
Thanks, as always, for your support.
Sincerely,
---
---
Geoff Diehl Republican Candidate for Governor

clean_body: Please join me in supporting rights and freedoms for all Massachusetts citizens. | | | | | Dear Friend, GREAT NEWS! Earlier this afternoon, the United States Supreme Court sided with individual rights and liberty and struck down President Biden's vaccine mandate for private employers. This is a tremendous victory for the American people, not to mention a positive step for our state's economic recovery. The Democrats' progressive agenda is obviously in complete disarray! Here in Massachusetts, I have been consistent in my opposition to egregious government mandates that wrongfully take away the freedoms of our citizens. The government does not have the right to mandate that citizens submit to medical treatment they do not approve of as a condition of their employment in a free and open society. Too many people, including many first responders and health care providers, have already lost their jobs and their livelihoods due to such mandates, and it's wrong. I will continue to fight for individual rights and to oppose draconian government mandates throughout my campaign for Governor. Thanks, as always, for your support. Sincerely, Geoff Diehl Republican Candidate for Governor == | I'm working hard every day to be your next Governor. We need someone to stand up for individual rights and liberties, and I pledge to do that. But, in order to get there, I need your help. Will you please help our campaign? body:
Trump told supporters at his Arizona rally, and his devoted supporters all across the country, that defeating Mark Kelly is not only a top priority of his in 2022 — but it should be one of theirs as well.
#

Friends —
Last night, Donald Trump sent a message we cannot ignore.
Trump started his Arizona rally last night with a call to defeat Mark Kelly. He called Mark a “radical.” He said he had to be fired. He came back later in the speech to attack Mark at length for several minutes. It's clear now that beating Mark is a top priority for him, and for his supporters.
So what does that mean for us?
It probably means more attack ads. It means more attacks and disinformation on social media. It means more far-right big money against Mark.
It means Mark’s re-election just got that much harder — and this was already a razor-close race.
It also means Mark needs your help. One day — everything we have. It means the maximum collective response to say we will defend Mark from these attacks, and we will defend Arizona’s seat. Together.
[**Please make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign today — especially today — after Trump’s attacks at his Arizona rally last night. There is only one way we win: together.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-jan22?refcode=em220116-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1952_6688874_MxMo0V&akid=1952%2E6688874%2EMxMo0V)

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Just in: GA prosecutors zeroing in on Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=AtjLBioXvAcz2L99C3AKjNP7MmRFnr9a&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
We just got a bombshell report from Rachel Maddow:
**Donald Trump 's personal lawyers have officially met with the Fulton County, Georgia, district attorney's office, which is investigating Trump's interference in the 2020 election.**
This is a major step closer to ensuring the former president is held accountable for his potentially criminal misconduct.
Let me quickly remind you of the egregious behavior being investigated. Just days before his January 6 rally that helped incite an insurrection on our Capitol, Trump - in his mad dash to try to overturn his election defeat - called Georgia's secretary of state and pressured him to "find" enough votes to flip the state in Trump's favor.
Trump laced the conversation with veiled threats, applying clearly improper - and potentially unlawful - pressure on Georgia's secretary of state, their top election official.
**The Georgia prosecutor 's office says they're making significant progress - and may even convene a special grand jury with subpoena power over the former president.**
But nearly the entire Republican Party is clinging to Trump, and they are dead set on protecting him from accountability - no matter the cost to our republic. The pressure on those who seek to hold Trump accountable will be intense.
**So in light of this breaking news, we have to keep up the grassroots pressure in support of accountability for Trump. This time, I need 3,500 more Democrats to take action before 11:59 p.m.:[If you agree criminal charges should be considered for Donald Trump for attempting to tamper with Georgia's election results, click here to add your name right now!](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-TFF?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1126-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-trump-accountability%3Fcode%3Djtk1126-su-nd)**
We are inching closer and closer to accountability for the former president. Now is not the time to let up the pressure, so thank you for making your voice heard.
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=WRZ8agmbHBbGB%2BTkjKniH9P7MmRFnr9a&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

Tonight at 11:59 P.M. is the mid-month deadline – and our FIRST fundraising deadline of 2022 – but as it stands, we’re still $8,605 SHORT. To make matters worse, news just broke that Tony Evers has amassed $10.5 million in cash on hand to lie, attack, and smear our campaign just as we kick off the election year. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: We came up short
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

The DCCC raised over $146 million dollars in 2021, setting an off-year
record by $22 million dollars. That’s a whole lotta money to protect
entrenched incumbents and elect corporate candidates.

It’s hard to keep pace with the Democratic establishment when they can go
to Wall Street, Big Pharma, and fossil fuel executives to ask for big
checks. But we don’t need to raise $146 million dollars in order to fund
our work to win 6 progressive primary races in 2022. We just need to hit
our fundraising goals between now and the midterm elections.

We fell short of the $70,000 we needed to hit to be on track with our
fundraising goals. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/89259?refcode=em20220116-21511&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=21511%2E1203867%2E54OeZ6 ]Peter,
can you contribute $3 to
help us meet our fundraising goals in January? The strength of our
campaigns to expand the Squad and bring progressive, working-class power
to Congress is counting on you.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/89259?refcode=em20220116-21511&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=21511%2E1203867%2E54OeZ6 ]Contribute

We’re working each and every day to usher in a new generation of
leadership by electing diverse, working-class candidates who aren’t afraid
of the bold policies we need to address the many crises we’re facing.

Thank you so much for your support. We appreciate you.

— Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=21511%2E1203867%2E54OeZ6 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=21511%2E1203867%2E54OeZ6 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220116-21511-footer&t=1024&refcode2=21511_1203867_54OeZ6&akid=21511%2E1203867%2E54OeZ6

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=21511%2E1203867%2E54OeZ6

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: Another Loss for Biden, Another Win for Freedom
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mmtkgMXiL4LdgxhDBOVCP-3rLE55T2CVyVVaUQOTtczgTAzwFx0B2YT9UfsTSCK-zJ7o2uwbqeua06SFc3T85OucT53BWnvIBE0fpaTStFPKmpm7YOdVhqOQ0Q2IokK8bV9fROCYP1aaVeC7kSd8mSfz7X9vQ2kr4hovH2u9LbPoWUDqMvOjwGWjzoOqkQwUyxw4Y7WOaX5wt_GHwZnxrr19-ythnHIY&c=9wjGcOEbmtmxJqqABDL62wS-u5OmmeqhWWR1FPKI_EiJijRVWsTPyQ==&ch=ntlEoamwezk2hE9vWp-g_otgDZRDKpLn8I8lQ62wd7IBf-UQVMZITw==)
