| Peter,
The Biden administration is on the wrong side of history yet again. The U.S. Supreme Court just dealt Joe Biden and his unconstitutional, freedom-stifling edicts a body blow. The Biden-Harris-OSHA agenda has thankfully been stopped. In Florida, we already said no to vaccine mandates. Now, the Supreme Court agrees. BUT the Supreme Court did not deliver a full win for workers, sidelining our nurses and doctors on the frontlines and ignoring the science due to Justices Roberts and Kavanaugh siding with the liberal justices to uphold the CMS mandate. [HELP ME CONTINUE THE FIGHT FOR FREEDOM](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mmtkgMXiL4LdgxhDBOVCP-3rLE55T2CVyVVaUQOTtczgTAzwFx0B2YT9UfsTSCK-zJ7o2uwbqeua06SFc3T85OucT53BWnvIBE0fpaTStFPKmpm7YOdVhqOQ0Q2IokK8bV9fROCYP1aaVeC7kSd8mSfz7X9vQ2kr4hovH2u9LbPoWUDqMvOjwGWjzoOqkQwUyxw4Y7WOaX5wt_GHwZnxrr19-ythnHIY&c=9wjGcOEbmtmxJqqABDL62wS-u5OmmeqhWWR1FPKI_EiJijRVWsTPyQ==&ch=ntlEoamwezk2hE9vWp-g_otgDZRDKpLn8I8lQ62wd7IBf-UQVMZITw==) [RUSH IN $20.22 NOW >>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mmtkgMXiL4LdgxhDBOVCP-3rLE55T2CVyVVaUQOTtczgTAzwFx0B2YT9UfsTSCK-zJ7o2uwbqeua06SFc3T85OucT53BWnvIBE0fpaTStFPKmpm7YOdVhqOQ0Q2IokK8bV9fROCYP1aaVeC7kSd8mSfz7X9vQ2kr4hovH2u9LbPoWUDqMvOjwGWjzoOqkQwUyxw4Y7WOaX5wt_GHwZnxrr19-ythnHIY&c=9wjGcOEbmtmxJqqABDL62wS-u5OmmeqhWWR1FPKI_EiJijRVWsTPyQ==&ch=ntlEoamwezk2hE9vWp-g_otgDZRDKpLn8I8lQ62wd7IBf-UQVMZITw==) Let me tell you, in Florida, we are going to continue to protect all workers. This is not complicated: you should not lose your job because you refuse the jab. That may happen in Biden's America, but not in the Free State of Florida. I called out this charade of Biden and Fauci from day one and focused on protecting the rights and livelihoods of Floridians. And now the rest of America will be safe from the threats of Joe Biden encroaching on our freedoms. Peter, [our fight is far from over against Joe Biden and Dr. Fauci's authoritarian edicts. Can I count on you to donate $100, $50, or even $20.22 to help me continue the fight for freedom in Florida?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mmtkgMXiL4LdgxhDBOVCP-3rLE55T2CVyVVaUQOTtczgTAzwFx0B2YT9UfsTSCK-zJ7o2uwbqeua06SFc3T85OucT53BWnvIBE0fpaTStFPKmpm7YOdVhqOQ0Q2IokK8bV9fROCYP1aaVeC7kSd8mSfz7X9vQ2kr4hovH2u9LbPoWUDqMvOjwGWjzoOqkQwUyxw4Y7WOaX5wt_GHwZnxrr19-ythnHIY&c=9wjGcOEbmtmxJqqABDL62wS-u5OmmeqhWWR1FPKI_EiJijRVWsTPyQ==&ch=ntlEoamwezk2hE9vWp-g_otgDZRDKpLn8I8lQ62wd7IBf-UQVMZITw==) Thank you for your continued support. Sincerely,
---

| Ron DeSantis

| | Folks, In the midst of the 2020 election, when it became clear that states would implement mail-in voting to protect our voices at the ballot box, **Trump and his allies attempted to defund the United States Postal Service to erode the effectiveness of vote-by-mail.** The nation depends on the United States Postal Service but right now, Trump’s handpicked Postmaster General Louis DeJoy is raising prices and slowing down the service millions depend on ahead of this critical 2022 election. **[Will you sign on in support of USPS?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcvIZrrsPi2ArbSUBJFmQliqq-SHSzjjMYmkAucoKYQlAfEiq05CLZ6J8MHQZhYlkYmdIe-lK2U-5yk9cm9H59rGlCmNQSE9AVKIIQBIr6HQFnI-lidHn0VQ_iCyiK2hYvbOIklkRNNvizLIprXgbGPxwjUmgFXVjC9RJ5gbWoTeGQcAe9ZZvE8sfjF_hdYUo84vHLCM9HWovcYCNB5LpdXmt_yaQy7IgPRY6xzAtvALiTRLwui1gZAECb7ua4YWy3o6NEf5LOIOUuYlE2SOrDT0yWPEznXgItpJj2m0edLYmlphNdKHb_Lk7Xh4R7PXEg/3ir/-Tw2g_AVTJqMlRRTMpPX-w/h1/a-tniaNZUdNMpO7sgHf4tFGWTV1sA1qo92JL01tCMfU)** **500 Signatures Needed:****[Save the United States Postal Service →](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcvIZrrsPi2ArbSUBJFmQliqq-SHSzjjMYmkAucoKYQloNRd1sZkTjkYjKC3x6AJmS0J04SkifA328yGS-FoPMUhocgcxJX3iGeh_rEELyOH8II9N7NnGiaRF7B10dkkZ62yzOeGN1RlMK0UUl2DZsQMWzHSyzLs1luzFCbJfq18reYBxr3Q69chPCbAFNn5xounuK2FYrJ0VntiCcj4eNIAwnpRNBjwEEhBXmrU9sOe0JRwqYFuDmsmmXjuNzBFHXgwh646rWdvGfcBRdMnD9Ddlab8Cz08r2cV6KSGrUxll35TEfsDmY3fw4gY-t_mWg/3ir/-Tw2g_AVTJqMlRRTMpPX-w/h2/GzSIhadmWVrhf6mU5mAT9hzjdkvwxiwbf_12VxOsS20)** | | | [SAVE USPS: SIGN ON →](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcvIZrrsPi2ArbSUBJFmQliqq-SHSzjjMYmkAucoKYQl4D-ejf2Sy3grn-B2WxawdgVjZ2P3Y6i_LbRpbvmQr9JhuWiahSlECVjyQcEXdR_hcrhe2soji5RpaQ0y9ZKo6DsIpIsPfrJGJshhP6rmvmJOwDoJ7Hv23bI7GCspgJjs2bLS6kerFp5wSH-2a6lDqo0iCsNf2fS0P9e1sKqN7fJVjP7FxpBddVAuB82I4LeEKScUtNa0-s-ms_vnnaVuDiFUN29rjt5lT8_A-yUIiCcptFs2bb7QUZ0daiRY7obN0dXhvG7c4uF0gNTI_Kzggg/3ir/-Tw2g_AVTJqMlRRTMpPX-w/h3/3im_sWsF0N5sapUcOf0KKyP4WHYtWIcsJgYSt8hk_p0)
---
I fought back against Trump and the GOP’s attempts to limit access to the ballot box by permanently expanding mail-in voting — _even after he spread misinformation about the validity of mail ballots and sued our state._
Now, Trump loyalist Postmaster Louis DeJoy continues to sabotage the effectiveness of the USPS, which could impact the ability of _millions_ of Americans to mail in their ballots in November.
As we continue to grapple with the pandemic, Nevadans deserve safe and secure options to have their voices heard. In a battleground state like ours, it’s crucial every vote and every voice is counted.
**[We have to ensure the USPS continues to serve at full capacity so we can turn out voters in every corner of the state. clean_body: | | | | | Folks, In the midst of the 2020 election, when it became clear that states would implement mail-in voting to protect our voices at the ballot box, Trump and his allies attempted to defund the United States Postal Service to erode the effectiveness of vote-by-mail. The nation depends on the United States Postal Service but right now, Trump’s handpicked Postmaster General Louis DeJoy is raising prices and slowing down the service millions depend on ahead of this critical 2022 election. 500 Signatures Needed: | | | I fought back against Trump and the GOP’s attempts to limit access to the ballot box by permanently expanding mail-in voting — even after he spread misinformation about the validity of mail ballots and sued our state. Now, Trump loyalist Postmaster Louis DeJoy continues to sabotage the effectiveness of the USPS, which could impact the ability of millions of Americans to mail in their ballots in November. As we continue to grapple with the pandemic, Nevadans deserve safe and secure options to have their voices heard. In a battleground state like ours, it’s crucial every vote and every voice is counted. | | Thank you, Steve Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. subject: Fellow Conservative - we need you on our team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3ar8l--fgxr-4qqlpo5&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)
| |

---
| | | _**Betsy DeVos here -- I served in the Trump Administration and I have an urgent message for Fellow Conservative:**_

Things have gotten dire for Trump endorsed Marco Rubio. After having been outraised TWO QUARTERS in a ROW by a Trump Impeachment Manager, Marco risks falling to his opponent...AGAIN.

Marco has a **MAJOR DEADLINE THAT WAS EXTENDED** and Marco asked me to reach out to you, Fellow Conservative. He said you would be someone we could count on.

Can you please not let us down? Something, even $7 will make the difference in this battle against his Radical Trump Impeachment Manager opponent. Marco is currently in a DEAD HEAT with his opponent and is facing being outraised yet again.

I was able to work with Marco’s Team and build out a personalized link for JUST YOU, Fellow Conservative:
**[https://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/devos-high-stakes-race/?personal-link-for-topconservative](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ar8l-1tfxv-4qqlpo6/ "https://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/devos-high-stakes-race/?personal-link-for-topconservative")**
So Fellow Conservative, can you please chip in before it’s too late? We only have til midnight before we close the books and reassess Marco’s budget. If he falls behind again, we are going to be in serious trouble.

---
---
Thank you,

Betsy DeVos

President Trump's Secretary of Education
---
| |
* * *
---

| _A personal note from Marco Rubio_ :

Fellow Conservative, did you see what my former Trump Impeachment Manager opponent said about our race?

Demings is a do-nothing Democrat with a laughable record. Schumer and his cronies are propping her up with their multi-million dollar warchests all because they know she'll be a RUBBER STAMP for their radical agenda. If we let up and the Democrats win in Florida, they will KEEP control of the Senate and continue to force their dangerous agenda through Congress.

It is up to us to stop this, Fellow Conservative. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ar8l-1tfxx-4qqlpo8/ "please click here to donate now.")**

Thank you for everything you do,

Marco Rubio

body:
|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40754371/325778962/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmU0Mjc1Ny0xODc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lgqgUiDZ7BHIGSC-Vmdr8zgaQJK052cgy1eUwkOQcck=)

If we're finally going to flip New York's 1st District blue, after years of radical Republican representation, I really need _your_ help, friend.

Not this fall, but **today,** while we've still got plenty of time to prepare for the midterms.

**[Yesterday, my campaign set a goal of 200 donors by the end of the week, and we've still got a ways to go to make the mark. I need 146 grassroots supporters to step up and help me get ready for the midterms – can I count on you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40754372/325778963/1150476578?refcode=em22_220116_fd2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmU0Mjc1Ny0xODc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lgqgUiDZ7BHIGSC-Vmdr8zgaQJK052cgy1eUwkOQcck=)**

While Lee Zeldin (R) was busy aligning himself with Donald Trump and stoking division, I've been hard at work fighting for the working people and families that live on Long Island.

**Now that Zeldin's decided to run for governor, we've got the clearest pathway we've ever had to take back our voice in Congress.** Still, there's _no_ shortage of individuals running on his extremist model.

If there's one thing Long Islanders cannot afford, it's another Lee Zeldin. **Flipping this seat is about _much more_ than defending our Democratic majority; it's about bringing honest and responsible representation back to our district – I know we can do that if we work together.**

**[That's why I'm personally reaching out today, team. I need 146 more folks to become 2022 founding donors and set our movement up for a red to blue flip right here in NY's 1st District. Will chip in $5 or whatever you can today to help?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40754375/325778966/1150476578?refcode=em22_220116_fd2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmU0Mjc1Ny0xODc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lgqgUiDZ7BHIGSC-Vmdr8zgaQJK052cgy1eUwkOQcck=)**

clean_body: | = If we're finally going to flip New York's 1st District blue, after years of radical Republican representation, I really need your help, friend. Not this fall, but today, while we've still got plenty of time to prepare for the midterms. = | = = While Lee Zeldin (R) was busy aligning himself with Donald Trump and stoking division, I've been hard at work fighting for the working people and families that live on Long Island. Now that Zeldin's decided to run for governor, we've got the clearest pathway we've ever had to take back our voice in Congress. Still, there's no shortage of individuals running on his extremist model. If there's one thing Long Islanders cannot afford, it's another Lee Zeldin. Flipping this seat is about much more than defending our Democratic majority; it's about bringing honest and responsible representation back to our district – I know we can do that if we work together. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, take care. name: Nikki Haley
subject: Get our kids into the classroom
body:
| | | | We have one last time to make a difference, Friend.
---
Friend,
---
This is outrageous. Teachers unions are holding our kids hostage to get even more concessions before they return to in-person learning.
What’s even more infuriating are the reports that school officials used federal funds to indoctrinate our kids with Critical Race Theory lesson plans.
As parents, we have one job – the success of our children. [_**It’s time to take on the teachers unions and fight back.**_](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=00236ace4e3040d98a887dc6b559243d&_e=ygZzmrOZ7oSbYksQ3iJfvHqIqusDQ5UcbRFKD5vdMnXhRGYwWl80U-29PX4gJwsNWW-bB31U2vdQAyJ0GRXypEGK6MllFjaZHVJ7FSbD9y_i3DmGl0_Y5vYXbjJzGpMSNrsIzoWMLg6kuZN7d6M8Kt9LSEj1HJDvY9RpT8EwrVvGx4qiMnI69bzQtNNl2V-HElo198UkaUSgIguRQXXLEGJFWBYh7EOCXR7YUW2caJId03KjXIojGgRDEX0FUxYuweJB5AqJNoAPd8HUq8D4GokZhBIoCZCxRB5CXvZRv-ReAvFDTET_J1Xp5zzt0lWavvTaDV-dBW0PuTPcvLWWdNWWOBF9_OtWNpjbNznaV4XdhtrUdYhh_LPtWxsMmeSBROwvnga3NXbPK4-_i47GXGxtvFpL-4ZiDjrq7XaviC8dR4Rgr5_n1jXqhiURqNTdKKBye-ibAzfMvWe_7L2Y6w%3D%3D)

clean_body: | | | | We have one last time to make a difference, Friend. Friend, This is outrageous. Teachers unions are holding our kids hostage to get even more concessions before they return to in-person learning. What’s even more infuriating are the reports that school officials used federal funds to indoctrinate our kids with Critical Race Theory lesson plans. As parents, we have one job – the success of our children. | | The damage the teachers unions are doing to our children is immeasurable. We will have an entire generation that will be less equipped to enter the workforce because labor bosses put themselves ahead of the welfare of our students. Big teachers unions around the country know they can get away with anything at this point because Joe Biden is on their side. It’s absolutely heartbreaking, Friend. My very best, Nikki Haley Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

name: Ammon Bundy for Governor
subject: Meridian Election "Mistake" Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by [Ammon Bundy for Governor](https://www
body:
| | [](https://www.votebundy.com)
---
| Peter,In late November I was informed of a possible election integrity issue in the City of Meridian for City Council Seat 6. Mike Hon was the conservative candidate and his name was not printed correctly on the ballot according to Idaho Statue. Mike Hon lost by 51 votes and this "misprint" may have very well been the cause. Ada County Clerk, Phil McGrane knew about the violation approximately a month before the election took place but said _he hoped it would be a landslide and therefore it would not matter_. 51 votes is not a landslide. There was a 21 day period to challenge the election and Mike Hon did so, but the Ada County Clerks Office only recounted the vote. What good did that do? The vote tally was not the issue. The issue was the ballots not being printed correctly and therefore people were much less likely to vote for Mike Hon. Now the 21 day limitation is passed and the people of the City of Meridian have a liberal city council member that should not be voting on their future. Being concerned about Ada County election integrity, I could see that this illegal action needed to be challenged. If they get away with making an "election mistake" for a City Council seat, then what would keep them from making an "election mistake" in the Idaho Governor race? Also, why should the people of Meridian just accept this mistake and allow a liberal to make decisions for the rest of them when he was not duly elected? I believe action is required and we now have 87 people from Meridian who are willing to join in legal action to bring accountability to the matter. It took more time than I had hoped, between my attorneys having two major cases to finish up and me being on the campaign trail, until last week we could not dedicate enough time to get the ball rolling. Now things are rolling and this upcoming week we will be sending out consent forms to those who want to join the legal action. If you live in the City of Meridian and have not signed up already, but would like to join then sign up here. It is not too late. <https://votebundy.com/go/87d3bea1-365e-4717-bb0f-26bda341563b>Throughout this process we will need you to donate to this effort whether you are part of the legal action or not. You do not have to live in Meridian for an "election mistake" to affect you. This is a statewide issue and should be a concern to each of us. So, please donate to the legal team! <https://team.votebundy.com/donate?cause=meridian_suit>We will push this matter as far as we can and put accountability on all those in government who seem to disregard the importance of Idaho election integrity!Thank you for your patience as we go through this process. Legal procedures are often slow and cumbersome so please continue to be patient with us and support this effort. We have a good legal team that cares and will help restore confidence in Idaho elections.
Ammon Bundy
P.S. Please donate to help election integrity in Idaho! [](https://team.votebundy.com/donate?cause=meridian_suit)

* * *

* * *

You received this email because your email address was submitted to us through [our website](https://www.votebundy.com). If you did not authorize use of this email address, or no longer wish to receive such messages, please simply [unsubscribe](https://team.votebundy.com/unsubscribe?id=8d545fe0-6532-4b1e-8220-7189428a1194) to immediately have your address removed from our mailing list.

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I’m embarrassed to ask.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
You’ve already done so much.

| [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ztm6fi6s95rk0up25ih6ne9fe3rbh74vdstpfimo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2cpjm4oj0cth2bs)
---

Folks,

I’m a little embarrassed. You know my parents always taught me to be grateful, not ask for too much, and thank those who were nice enough to give me a gift. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in 2021 made me happier than a penguin in an ice chest.

**Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left’s agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting.** I couldn’t do it without you. That’s why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in 2021, but there’s just too much on the line not to ask.

I missed my 2021 fundraising goals, and my Radical Left opponents noticed. They’ve not only taken notice, but they’re taking action. They’ve called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat me in 2022 and push their Socialist Agenda. This can’t happen.

**I NEED YOUR HELP. I’M HUMBLY ASKING.**
The only way we’re going to save America, Take Back the Senate, and stop the Left’s Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We’ve got to start 2022 off right, and I’m hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below.

body:

Folks, we’re just hours away from our first mid-month deadline of the year, and we can reach our goal if just 9 supporters from your area chip in today. Meeting our fundraising targets is critical to supporting Martin’s fights for New Mexico — from investing in quality education, to protecting our wildlife, to acting on climate. **So, can you add a donation of any amount to be one of the 9 supporters who help us reach our goal? Chip in through your personalized donation link:[secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-em-january-2022?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40754751/325781158/1676867678?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20220116_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzI2YTcwNC0yMDc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1AngQhIvu-lolQnFzvkggqDmd5UWhx7_GXjBbQk-MBg=)** Thanks for all you do. — Team Heinrich

subject: response requested from dpwillis67@gmail.com by 11:59 PM ⏱️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
We're requesting at least 60 more signatures from local Democrats before midnight: | | | | _**URGENT FILIBUSTER UPDATE FOR YOU**_

This is HUGE: Joe Biden just came out in support of CHANGING the filibuster so that the Senate can pass voting rights reform.

With our democracy hanging in the balance, this moment could not be more important.

That's why we're urgently collecting responses from grassroots Democrats like you.

**Let us know: Do you agree with President Biden that we must change the filibuster?**
****
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---

_**We 're requesting at least 60 more signatures from local Democrats before midnight. Please submit your response straight away.**_

We need to move NOW.

**FIRST: **

Republicans across the country launched **HUNDREDS** of voter suppression bills, while their allies in the Senate derailed our efforts to defend our democracy.

**BUT THEN:**

President Biden JUMPED into action - and announced he supports changes to the filibuster:

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/z7-)

**SO NOW:**

**[We're urgently collecting input from our best grassroots supporters to see where they stand on this pivotal issue. Can you spare just one minute and let us know if you agree with President Biden that we must change the filibuster? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**
| [PETITION RESPONSE: PENDING
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/AGmXQy6K~)
| [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/~j-)[SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/j~)
---
****
Thanks,

DCCC

name: Josh (personal)
subject: What I’m excited most about being a father
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/FuH6iIntv1S_k0RIhiLeHNbug8LZSjmAZEvqWNSs2y8=/Mza4QBrxO5dW3sVaH3FPFG0a1UfOkVLkUe1B8JhFpg0=?refcode=E13503-20220116-ExcitedAboutBeingaFather-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) | Peter, Last month, I got to share some really incredible news with you all - Pam and I are having a baby! It's been an absolute whirlwind, and I'm so grateful for the well wishes and advice you all sent our way... the diaper tips were duly noted. We have a lot of "first" moments headed our way - first steps, first words (yes I will be putting my persuasion skills to use for Da-Da), and I can't wait to share them all right next to Pam. There's a lot of world to introduce our baby to, and it's a bit overwhelming to think about all the lessons and values we want to teach our little one. There's also a lot of challenges in the years ahead that I'll admit become a lot realer knowing I'm bringing a child into the world. The threat of climate change, our divided education system, even the threats to our democracy, take on new meaning. As Pam and I eagerly await our new arrival, I'm continually grateful to have the opportunity to be in a position to push the levers of government for good. A lot of politicians spend time yelling on TV for a quick jolt of fame, but to be honest, that's not really my thing. I know what will really mark my time in Congress is what I'm able to get done to make our kids' lives just a bit easier, maybe even a bit more joyful. So on that note, if you are able to chip in and help keep me in Congress fighting for that future, I'd be grateful. [**I hope you 'll join me.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/FuH6iIntv1S_k0RIhiLeHNbug8LZSjmAZEvqWNSs2y8=/Mza4QBrxO5dW3sVaH3FPFG0a1UfOkVLkUe1B8JhFpg0=?refcode=E13503-20220116-ExcitedAboutBeingaFather-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) All my best,
Josh
---
* * *

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/FuH6iIntv1S_k0RIhiLeHNbug8LZSjmAZEvqWNSs2y8=/0ej9pQf2di0gCSQf-14w1CDYpE4zRXk4aCP_tNR8pkw=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/FuH6iIntv1S_k0RIhiLeHNbug8LZSjmAZEvqWNSs2y8=/RQ8DLdXErnIUJTmiyZpQQOfY15LR2jW7mhm0xT-ShjE=)

You can click [**here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/FuH6iIntv1S_k0RIhiLeHNbug8LZSjmAZEvqWNSs2y8=/JKUPPNXDpKPUjKFR-kDkjLD2I5Zfi6q-gYUVSawS9to=?recipientId=JGP1LIgKX8KYGR8WifkGL1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to get only the most important updates, or you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/FuH6iIntv1S_k0RIhiLeHNbug8LZSjmAZEvqWNSs2y8=/SKPdBaGNyf4RMtdJ2BkCbw6_aFpO9MhZP5N_6tzF68g=) here.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/FuH6iIntv1S_k0RIhiLeHNbug8LZSjmAZEvqWNSs2y8=/Mza4QBrxO5dW3sVaH3FPFG0a1UfOkVLkUe1B8JhFpg0=?refcode=E13503-20220116-ExcitedAboutBeingaFather-footer-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/FuH6iIntv1S_k0RIhiLeHNbug8LZSjmAZEvqWNSs2y8=/Mza4QBrxO5dW3sVaH3FPFG0a1UfOkVLkUe1B8JhFpg0=?refcode=E13503-20220116-ExcitedAboutBeingaFather-footer-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)

Josh and his wife Pam live in Turlock where Josh grew up and delivered newspapers for the Turlock Journal. Josh was re-elected to Congress on behalf of families in the Central Valley where he's fighting to hold our government accountable, pass COVID-19 relief, and deliver on our progressive values. **[Will you help him keep up the fight in Congress by making a contribution today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/FuH6iIntv1S_k0RIhiLeHNbug8LZSjmAZEvqWNSs2y8=/Mza4QBrxO5dW3sVaH3FPFG0a1UfOkVLkUe1B8JhFpg0=?refcode=E13503-20220116-ExcitedAboutBeingaFather-footer-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)**

name: Val Demings
subject: This is a dire moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
the GOP is stacking the cards against me.
#
I'm worried, Team. With hours left to meet tonight's fundraising goal, **I'm still falling $13,441 short.** Please, let me explain why this is such a dire moment:
**I'm neck and neck with Marco Rubio in the race that will determine Senate control, and CNN contributors like James Carville have "zero doubt" that I CAN win.**
The problem is that the GOP is stacking the cards against me because they KNOW this race is Democrats' best chance to expand our Senate majority. Far-right outside groups are dumping millions into Florida, and the chair of the RNC just attacked me _personally._
**I'm looking at my fundraising numbers now, and I won't be able to defend myself from these GOP attacks if I don't reach my goal in the next few hours.**
**[Missing this goal and falling behind in this race could mean handing the Senate right back to Mitch McConnell, so I have to ask: Will you split $5 right now between my campaign and Jacky Rosen's to help me defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40755159/325782771/979107015?refcode=jr_em_nd_220115_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTliZmVkMi0yMjc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=93fqZPbJZMjDPMnrEUSabo5D6cuhjgGtLbJmAoT19A8=)**
Thank you for stepping up when it matters most.
Val Demings

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40755160/325782772/979107015?refcode=jr_em_nd_220115_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTliZmVkMi0yMjc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=93fqZPbJZMjDPMnrEUSabo5D6cuhjgGtLbJmAoT19A8=)**

body:
| | | **BREAKING: Obama defeated Trump in a new presidential poll, but we need YOUR official response!

subject: Join Senator Ted Cruz and Christian Collins on the Campaign Trail!

name: Ted Cruz
subject: MORE Evidence that Fauci Lied to Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| | |
---
| | Peter,

---
I've been 100% clear on my opinion of Dr. Anthony Fauci. He's been dishonest, political, and partisan, distorting science to exercise authoritarian control and cover up his own conduct.

**He is the most dangerous bureaucrat in U.S history.**

I've demanded the Department of Justice INVESTIGATE and PROSECUTE Fauci for lying to Congress when he claimed that the federal government and his NIH did not fund "gain-of-function" research in Wuhan, China.
| **And now, we have 221 pages of records obtained by Judicial Watch through a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit that provide DAMNING new evidence, including a grant application for research involving the coronavirus that was submitted back in 2018!**
---
---
| | _When Fauci lied to Congress, he lied to the American people._

18 USC 1001 makes this a felony, punishable by up to **5 years in prison**.

_We need to know the FULL EXTENT of what Fauci is attempting to hide!_
**[**Take a stand to help me EXPOSE FAUCI**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59264902:6pd6nvENh:m:1:3253819041:3C7EDFF5297E30B3F948A50EFA1A0E71:r)**

This new evidence obtained by Judicial Watch shows that Fauci did indeed know about "gain-of-function" research and funding of the Wuhan coronavirus.
Fauci, the Biden administration, and the Fake News media can attack me all they want... I WILL NOT STOP fighting to expose how Fauci and his bureaucrat pals spent MILLIONS of U.S. taxpayer dollars to make viruses more harmful and deadly.
Take action now to join me in this fight, Peter | | **[**CONTRIBUTE NOW **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59264902:6pd6nvENh:m:1:3253819041:3C7EDFF5297E30B3F948A50EFA1A0E71:r)**
---

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz

[**Support Ted Cruz for Senate**** **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59264902:6pd6nvENh:m:1:3253819041:3C7EDFF5297E30B3F948A50EFA1A0E71:r)
PS: And now Dr. Fauci says he supports new vaccine mandates and other onerous COIVD-19 restrictions on our freedoms- such as showing proof of vaccination to get on an airplane or even visit a private home! Dr. Fauci needs to go.
**[YES - I Support Ted Cruz: Expose & Prosecute Fauci!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59264902:6pd6nvENh:m:1:3253819041:3C7EDFF5297E30B3F948A50EFA1A0E71:r)**
[**DONATE $5 >>

body:
This is the worst time for me to fall short of my can't-miss goal
| | |
---
** Florida is one of the states most likely to determine Senate control, friend, but I'm still falling short of my midnight fundraising goal. ****My team pulled your supporter record, and here's what we found:**
| | **SUPPORTER RECORD**
---
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
DONOR STATUS: **PENDING**
SUGGESTED CONTRIBUTION: $5
DEADLINE: 11:59 p.m.
---
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40755286/325783536/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2129-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWEyYzVlYi0yNDc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wyblkheXYmqqdzKx9Jpm_VL_tmPSgUBA77AiJ-c8d-c=)
---
This is the worst time for me to fall short of my can't-miss goal. The Florida GOP launched a massive voter registration drive with the goal of flipping Florida red _permanently._ And between the Senate Republican campaign arm and Marco Rubio himself, the GOP has hauled in more than $100 million to flip the Senate for Mitch McConnell.

So even though The Cook Political Report increased my chances of winning, I have a steep mountain to climb to catch up to the GOP's advantage in Florida.

name: Ben Samuels
subject: Why I am running
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEN SAMUELS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Friend,
Earlier this month, I joined Ray Hartmann on St. Louis In The Know to discuss my campaign and why I am running. Listen to the full interview here. [https://soundcloud.com/550ktrs/itk-with-ray-ben-samuels-1-6-22] To quickly summarize our conversation, I am running for office because the people of Missouri deserve better. My family has lived in Missouri for six generations, and I am proud to call Missouri and St. Louis my home.
Before I tell you about what got me off the sidelines, can you contribute $15 to my campaign to help unseat 30-year Republican incumbent Ann Wagner? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-bs?refcode=220116-email&amount=15]
I started my career in the private sector, working for a tech startup and then for Mastercard. In 2016, the world began to feel like it was getting worse, not better. That motivated me to get out into the community. I worked for the former Democratic mayor of Chicago, Rahm Emanuel, and the Republican Governor of Massachusetts, Charlie Baker. I do not believe partisanship should block good policy, and I am proud of my bipartisan background.
Last year, during the January 6th insurrection, I mistakenly thought, “this is the worst things will get, and though normal is not good enough, we will go back to normal after this.” Since then, Ann Wagner and her Republican colleagues have continued to deny election results and undermine democracy.
It is time for government to work. Will you join me and donate $20.22 to my campaign? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-bs?refcode=220116-email&amount=20.22]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-bs?refcode=220116-email&express_lane=true&amount=10] DONATE $25 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-bs?refcode=220116-email&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-bs?refcode=220116-email&express_lane=true&amount=50] DONATE $100 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-bs?refcode=220116-email&express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE $250 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-bs?refcode=220116-email&express_lane=true&amount=250] DONATE ANY AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-bs?refcode=220116-email]
Our democracy is in danger, and a few years from now we may no longer have a democratic system. I love my home and see the problems we face here. I hear the voices of Republicans and Democrats alike, who are frustrated that their elected officials do not work for the folks who elected them. So, I decided to run for Congress.
It is time for a new generation of leadership. We need to tackle problems like violent crime by investing in our communities and supporting safe policing. We need to invest in our local economy, so young people don’t need to move away in order to find good opportunities. I will win this race, not because I have an R or a D next to my name, but because the people here want pragmatic, effective, and compassionate leadership.
Please join me as we work together to revitalize and deliver for St. Louis. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-bs?refcode=220116-email]
Gratefully,
Ben Samuels
Democratic Candidate for Missouri’s 2nd Congressional District
Ben Samuels is a businessperson, an economic policy expert, and a bipartisan problem-solver running for Congress in Missouri’s 2nd Congressional District to bring jobs and opportunities back to the St. Louis area.
Support Ben's campaign for Congress by making a donation today.
CONTRIBUTE $25 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-bs?refcode=220116-email&amount=25] CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-bs?refcode=220116-email&recurring=true]PAID FOR BY BEN SAMUELS FOR CONGRESS
Ben Samuels for Congress
9621 Olive Blvd.
P.O. Box 8484
Saint Louis, MO 63132-9998
United States

Hello,
As a retired three-star Admiral with decades of service in the U.S. Navy, I know what a weapon of war is capable of.
It’s infuriating that we still have elected officials like my Republican opponent Chuck Grassley who block gun legislation without seemingly any care for how many people will die as a result.
The bottom line is the NRA’s campaign donations stand in the way. And it is blood money, pure and simple.
I’ll never take money from the NRA. They should just assign me an “F” right now. I will wear it proudly because I am running a campaign funded by grassroots donations – not corporate PACs or special interests. **But if I’m going to be successful in defeating Chuck Grassley this November, I need your help today.**
We’'re about to face the biggest fundraising deadline of my campaign, and right now we’re still short of our goal. **Can I count on you to give to my campaign today so we can finally do _something_ to address the gun violence epidemic in this country?**
[**Please, click here now and give $5 or more directly to my campaign – whatever you can afford before our deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40755588/325785406/-42398318?refcode=em20220116pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWJjM2I2OS0yODc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=07zv_94rFvPkeMGiIGj9giS29Ri9MhC0P8gr7V-aihc=)

name: Team Casey Wardynski
subject: ** BIG ANNOUNCEMENT **
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CASEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Casey is humbled and honored to have Gen. Flynn’s support. Tap or click >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/11b51ccbf7d29bc5/abe27103050bf530c3d6b838967d376c/36963)
---
Peter,

Have you heard the BIG NEWS?

**Gen. Michael Flynn, who served as President Trump’s National Security Advisor following a 30-year career in the U.S. Army, has OFFICIALLY ENDORSED Casey in the AL-05 primary!**

Gen. Flynn is a true American patriot. And Casey is proud to have his support in this race and in our fight to SAVE AMERICA.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/11b51ccbf7d29bc5/da5e55b5a0869db2c3d6b838967d376c/36963)
---
Here’s what Gen. Flynn had to say:
_ “In times like these, it is incumbent upon good men to stand up for others. We are witnessing the attempted destruction of our nation from the top down, and we can no longer sit idly by or passively vote for weak representatives to send to our nation’s capital. These are some of the reasons why, today, I am announcing my endorsement of Hon. Casey Wardynski for Congress in AL-5._

_“Rarely does our country have the opportunity to elect true patriots like Casey Wardynski. I strongly and wholeheartedly endorse him and encourage the citizens of north Alabama to support him at the polls on May 24, 2022.”_
Please take action today to help us share Gen. Flynn’s message.

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: [sharing this photo with you]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter – when this photo was taken, I had no idea that I would grow up to become the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue. But I did know one thing: Public service and giving back to your community matter.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40755773/325787767/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk539-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDU3MzAxNy0yOTc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WpsTV_KwScS9ID9fW0KnxH_9eeddpEgoSYK1OyOg4Ew=)
You see, I don't come from a political dynasty, but my mom’s father served as a lieutenant in the Dubuque Fire Department, and my dad’s father earned a Purple Heart serving our country in World War II. Growing up, my parents instilled that sense of service in me. **They taught me that when someone asks for your help because there is work to be done or a problem to solve, you say yes.**
That's why, when I saw that my community needed someone to fight for them, I stepped up and ran for a seat in the Iowa House of Representatives, even though I was only 25 years old. It's why I ran for Congress against a man twice my age and won – even though plenty of folks said I didn't have the experience, that it wasn't my time.
It's why I'm going to defeat Sen. Grassley and become the youngest woman ever elected to the Senate. **I know that unseating a seven-term incumbent doesn't happen overnight. But I also know that nobody will fight harder than I will to flip this seat and fight for Iowans.**
Right now, Sen. Grassley is facing record-low approval ratings. Iowans are ready to show him the door, but I need your help to compete with GOP spending. **You see, tonight, I'm still $6,187 short of my mid-month goal, and there are just a few hours left until my 11:59 p.m. deadline.**
**[So please, can you donate $5 right now to elect the youngest woman senator, give working families in Iowa a real leader in Washington and protect our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40755774/325787768/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk539-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDU3MzAxNy0yOTc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WpsTV_KwScS9ID9fW0KnxH_9eeddpEgoSYK1OyOg4Ew=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40755775/325787769/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk539-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDU3MzAxNy0yOTc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WpsTV_KwScS9ID9fW0KnxH_9eeddpEgoSYK1OyOg4Ew=)
---
With Senate control on the line here in Iowa, the GOP will do everything in their power to stop our campaign – I'm counting on grassroots donors like you to stand with me and make up this gap tonight.
With gratitude,
– Abby

Growing up, my parents instilled that sense of service in me. They taught me that when someone asks for your help because there is work to be done or a problem to solve, you say yes. That's why, when I saw that my community needed someone to fight for them, I stepped up and ran for a seat in the Iowa House of Representatives, even though I was only 25 years old. It's why I ran for Congress against a man twice my age and won – even though plenty of folks said I didn't have the experience, that it wasn't my time. It's why I'm going to defeat Sen. Grassley and become the youngest woman ever elected to the Senate. I know that unseating a seven-term incumbent doesn't happen overnight. But I also know that nobody will fight harder than I will to flip this seat and fight for Iowans. Right now, Sen. Grassley is facing record-low approval ratings. Iowans are ready to show him the door, but I need your help to compete with GOP spending. You see, tonight, I'm still $6,187 short of my mid-month goal, and there are just a few hours left until my 11:59 p.m. deadline. = | | = With Senate control on the line here in Iowa, the GOP will do everything in their power to stop our campaign – I'm counting on grassroots donors like you to stand with me and make up this gap tonight. With gratitude, – Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

He talked about the failures of the Biden administration and emphasized the need to secure our border. [**Demand Biden Secure the Border NOW >>**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=f237be830a184674b257149f006e4c35&_e=kv3uhjzBS72iLnM1t08ZjoiM9zKqyFMVPmtZ2X6BAMa7EQzAikzkaYrXC2JpKxCSylLI0o9l9ifDdtN_8w-jVKp5nBy-afbB8eyCVyRHX0Wbywxg9L2hn4UxsMUdVbfkIig5cfyWo0vj1ENYKIQVXdp9g0Myh4d1PRyvAOhKiJTpN1oWrOFGr5a9bVdVTRUi8T4lODli1dc_ANlrCMPa1hcRerslgKJvcLnOl4Q3-klblBPlRUu6kbXDC3MGzZK8PBbzDVb3A5KvNezT8f15C8hCJaswvT_u0IIeSR5wcbQGypalScNcaXgWGXnAR19PQV9GcXWwCWd2WE2PTtN6gecdIhMMAL2PM0HL6bQDLIUelBNTLew4g_-ScMUaWohvvr-0h8tDN44jIGtRAufjqLUg7ujcTJGGLlCDtHqALkzRqywyc_Z_MAUBUfas7dNXMMp5GJ-V8UmcU5ApDqFBpuC_unjZXEeCeMsPnPCm3cioy-ODvw-cP5taGArE1ksP) I know our border is in a state of crisis. I’ve witnessed the horrors of drug cartels and human trafficking rings in my own hometown for **DECADES**. Women and children abused. Drugs pouring into our state from the cartels. Ranchers left to defend themselves. These are the atrocities our communities face **EVERY DAY.** You have my word, Friend: I will make border security my top priority because it’s deeply personal to me and the people I care about. **That’s why those most impacted by our open border trust me to deal with this CRISIS.** **In fact, Arizona had a****2300% INCREASE****in border encounters in 2021 compared to 2020. You read that right, Friend.****2300%.****Enough is enough.**_[**Join me because I’ll fight every day for a secure border >>**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=f237be830a184674b257149f006e4c35&_e=kv3uhjzBS72iLnM1t08ZjoiM9zKqyFMVPmtZ2X6BAMa7EQzAikzkaYrXC2JpKxCSylLI0o9l9ifDdtN_8w-jVKp5nBy-afbB8eyCVyRHX0Wbywxg9L2hn4UxsMUdVbfkIig5cfyWo0vj1ENYKIQVXdp9g0Myh4d1PRyvAOhKiJTpN1oWrOFGr5a9bVdVTRUi8T4lODli1dc_ANlrCMPa1hcRerslgKJvcLnOl4Q3-klblBPlRUu6kbXDC3MGzZK8PBbzDVb3A5KvNezT8f15C8hCJaswvT_u0IIeSR5wcbSC83eh7h3_hyQrTNCva448ApqTBkqkusaP4fOUlht6OKpQwtqwj__weiZnJvwmfIluu-z3RrrKya35S9SL8oFpgC3zWA5Rk5rCMoKD63R_ErztshYtDR8tPIoHBjWgje6lt6Nkagz3l5xGXRhlZy57z7qLPjLkJHrtMusjzUyQjjS_843AXEASzROHL0fs9HclOEHwx7LdV1yyZL4_RDsx)_ Joe Biden couldn’t be bothered to address the border when he followed Obama around in the White House for eight years. Now, Biden and Kamala will only go to the border for a mere photo op. **They’re afraid to come face-to-face with the consequences of their actions.** But Trump wasn’t afraid and neither am I. I will fight to protect Arizonans from drug cartels and shut down human traffickers. I will make Arizona a safer state because no one should have to worry about keeping their families safe from drug cartels and human traffickers. Please [**CHIP IN $25**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=f237be830a184674b257149f006e4c35&_e=kv3uhjzBS72iLnM1t08ZjoiM9zKqyFMVPmtZ2X6BAMa7EQzAikzkaYrXC2JpKxCSylLI0o9l9ifDdtN_8w-jVKp5nBy-afbB8eyCVyRHX0Wbywxg9L2hn4UxsMUdVbfkIig5cfyWo0vj1ENYKIQVXdp9g0Myh4d1PRyvAOhKiJTpN1oWrOFGr5a9bVdVTRUi8T4lODli1dc_ANlrCMPa1hcRerslgKJvcLnOl4Q3-klblBPlRUu6kbXDC3MGzZK8PBbzDVb3A5KvNezT8f15CwNs-IRbjjn_KjL38o8nhMu8mlg9tav7i2NODgP2DMW1-Z3Y6VHpZbMMZ6X_4YHWQCV9xdfM41Hf1oh0_38m1etQ05MIkKQKIwMWcohXHQCMJkalZogC2gwuavZaAMXw1SS2iSM7-bP4dp76lewrJqxsLb53ZxfgQccB5xRnhI9p6fxjsjTkMWEebjNinAKO12yN7WNKdkRyleQQ15RX0d7dIqzIDPUC4cnMPv-EznA6) to help in our fight to secure the border and keep Arizonans safe. I will be the Attorney General who fights for our border security every day. Arizonans deserve nothing less. clean_body: We need to secure our border ASAP. Here’s why you can trust me on the border >> Friend, Yesterday, Donald Trump came to Arizona for his first rally of the year. He talked about the failures of the Biden administration and emphasized the need to secure our border. I know our border is in a state of crisis. I’ve witnessed the horrors of drug cartels and human trafficking rings in my own hometown for DECADES. Women and children abused. Drugs pouring into our state from the cartels. Ranchers left to defend themselves. These are the atrocities our communities face EVERY DAY. You have my word, Friend: I will make border security my top priority because it’s deeply personal to me and the people I care about. That’s why those most impacted by our open border trust me to deal with this CRISIS. In fact, Arizona had a2300% INCREASEin border encounters in 2021 compared to 2020. You read that right, Friend.2300%.Enough is enough. Joe Biden couldn’t be bothered to address the border when he followed Obama around in the White House for eight years. Now, Biden and Kamala will only go to the border for a mere photo op. They’re afraid to come face-to-face with the consequences of their actions. But Trump wasn’t afraid and neither am I. I will fight to protect Arizonans from drug cartels and shut down human traffickers. I will make Arizona a safer state because no one should have to worry about keeping their families safe from drug cartels and human traffickers. Please to help in our fight to secure the border and keep Arizonans safe. I will be the Attorney General who fights for our border security every day. Arizonans deserve nothing less. Thank you, Tiffany Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General. Authorized by Shedd for Attorney General.

# It's been rough, Peter...
---
| The past several days has been rough for progressives. The [John Lewis Voting Rights Bill is being held up by a filibuster](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=8d30dd8701&e=42a933bda9) and [a right-wing SCOTUS killed a vaccine mandate meant to keep coworkers and their families safer from COVID-19](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=e2b0744c49&e=42a933bda9).

Clearly, we need more support at the Capitol to get President Biden’s agenda back on track, and the path to that goes through Wisconsin and the 5th CD. I’m preparing a strong grassroots push both on the ground and online as November gets closer that will help provide necessary GOTV support to our US Senate candidate. [**Will you assist us in this effort by contributing today? Every dollar raised gets us closer to victory.**](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=e6b3656c6d&e=42a933bda9)

name: Andy Beshear
subject: Looking ahead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
It's been a little over two years since I had the honor of being sworn in as the 63rd governor of Kentucky. Every day since then, my priority has been to put Kentuckians first – and we've accomplished a lot. Peter,

It's been a little over two years since I had the honor of being sworn in as the 63rd governor of Kentucky. Every day since then, my priority has been to put Kentuckians first – and we've accomplished a lot.

I'm proud to have worked with leaders on both sides of the aisle to invest in infrastructure and job creation. My administration has expanded and restored voting rights, improved public education and protected health care access for nearly 100,000 Kentuckians. We've implemented our Better Kentucky plan to clean up our water supply, improve internet access, and provide Kentucky students the world-class public education they deserve.

As we continue to battle the COVID-19 pandemic, I've been focused on keeping Kentuckians safe, ensuring our small businesses stay afloat, and protecting essential workers. And despite all the challenges we've faced, we had our best economic year in recent history and are creating more jobs with better wages than ever before.

We've made a lot of progress for the Commonwealth, but there's still more to be done.

Over the next two years, my priorities remain the same – doing what's best for Kentuckians. I'm working to ensure our communities have the resources they need to recover and rebuild from last month's devastating tornadoes. I'll continue to take the necessary steps to keep you and your loved ones safe from COVID-19. And I'll fight for the historic investments we need in our infrastructure, education, and for new jobs that pay good wages.

It won't be easy, but by coming together again and leaning on our values, I'm confident that we can continue to create real opportunity and progress in every community across the Commonwealth.

**[If you're with me in the fight for progress, will you chip in before our mid-month fundraising deadline to help me continue moving Kentucky forward?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40755864/325796050/-758409691?refcode=em22_220115_mm2_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220115_mm2_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjdjNzVkZS0yYzc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jpwmxPFQRs9ABNC-QF0aIcjNFJ5rAkSGctaKuOJ4_m8=)**

Thank you,

Andy | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Chip in today to become a founding donor of Andy's re-election campaign.** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40755865/325796051/-758409691?refcode=em22_220115_mm2_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220115_mm2_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjdjNzVkZS0yYzc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jpwmxPFQRs9ABNC-QF0aIcjNFJ5rAkSGctaKuOJ4_m8=)

name: BetoORourke.com
subject: Mail-in ballots are being rejected at alarming rates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
The GOP’s voter suppression efforts are working.
#
We just got word that mail-in ballot applications are being rejected at unprecedented rates in counties across Texas — thanks to the voter suppression bill Greg Abbott signed into law last summer.
In Travis County, the latest reports show that about 50% of mail-in ballot applications were rejected. And in Bexar County, officials said they were also forced to reject more than half of the applications that came in.
**The only way to change these laws and the terrible trajectory we’re on is to change the people in power.**
**[Please make a donation of $3 or more to help elect Beto and empower and mobilize the voters who will decide the future of this state.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51697?refcode=ema20220116-171780&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=171780%2E444211%2EIFdNsP)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51697?refcode=ema20220116-171780&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=171780%2E444211%2EIFdNsP)**
Right now, we need to raise the resources to reach, register, and turn out the voters who can help us stop this slide toward cruelty, corruption and authoritarianism, and win back Texas in November.
Abbott passed this voter suppression law to cement his own power. His success in this campaign will rely on low voter turnout from the communities most affected by these new voter restrictions.
**That means we have to work twice as hard, register more voters than ever before, and make sure a historic number of voters show up at the ballot box in November.**
**[This isn't the time to give up or give in. By making a donation to our campaign today you will help us reach the Texans most targeted by Abbott’s new voter suppression law.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51697?refcode=ema20220116-171780&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=171780%2E444211%2EIFdNsP)**
We can do it.
Thank you,
Beto for Texas

name: John Fetterman
subject: This will only take a minute, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
You can roll your eyes. But also, please read this??!!
#
Derek,
I’ll let you get back to your Sunday in a second, but I wanted to send you a quick personal note before tonight's mid-month deadline and ask if you'll **[chip in any amount that makes sense for you to support our campaign for Senate and help reach our $20,000 grassroots goal.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40855?refcode=ema20220116-4222&t=1&akid=4222%2E434096%2EmSQDVa)**
I knoooow, I know. It’s another donation ask, and if you’re rolling your eyes at me, that’s OK. Between Gisele and the kids, I’m kind of used to it. 🙄
But maybe you can give me a minute just to remind you why we send these emails in the first place. 🙏
First of all, I *seriously* believe that leaving this country better than my generation found it is possible. That belief is what got me into public service to begin with.
And it's why, alongside my incredible family, I decided to join this race for Senate (and start sending you an obnoxious amount of email) 😂
As much as we try to put the FUN in FUNdrai$ing with our emails, the stakes couldn’t be more serious in this race. The slower our online fundraising gets, the more ground we risk giving up to GOP opponents like Dr. Oz.
That’s not an option for us, especially not when Republicans and their super PACs have already spent more than $11.4 million on TV and radio ads...
Ok, alright, I'll let you get back to your Sunday evening. But with a few hours before our fundraising deadline, I’m hoping you’ll take this note to heart and **[send a few bucks our way before midnight to help make sure we can take this fight all the way to the floor of the U.S. Senate, no matter how many PACs try to outspend us.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40855?refcode=ema20220116-4222&t=2&akid=4222%2E434096%2EmSQDVa)** ❤️
You don’t have to love these emails, even though I think they’re pretty awesome. The important thing is, every time we send an email like this, some of yinz chip in. And person by person, day by day, it powers our entire historic grassroots campaign. And right now, we’re SO close to reaching our $20,000 mid-month goal!!!!
Thank you for being a part of this.
— John
John Fetterman
Lt. Governor of Pennsylvania
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40855?refcode=em20220116-4222&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4222%2E434096%2EmSQDVa)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220116-4222-footer&t=22&refcode2=4222_434096_mSQDVa&akid=4222%2E434096%2EmSQDVa)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=4222%2E434096%2EmSQDVa)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=4222%2E434096%2EmSQDVa)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Max Steiner
subject: Will you personally endorse my campaign?
body:
You are why this campaign has made it this far -- and frankly, we are only growing! |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40756262/325810737/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzJiNGFmOC0zNDc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OqZmMz__HL8fmwhMEOUnokIknXsZoGTHhbxA-2HYtS0=)
Hey there, friend.

It's been a busy few weeks on the campaign trail here in CA-01. This month alone we've held campaign office hours in Redding and Chico. I also hosted a press conference calling out Doug LaMalfa's betrayal of our Democracy after Jan 6th.

I'm so proud that I've been able to run an issues-focused campaign centered on the needs of the people. The pundits and establishment want to write us off, but they can't write off the passion I'm seeing in this community and what we're for.

We've outraised and outworked Doug LaMalfa, and we're sending a message that we are ready for bold, forward-thinking leadership in the North State. You are why this campaign has made it this far -- and frankly, we are only growing!

**[So today I have a special request: Will you add your name to say you personally endorse my campaign for Congress? We are hoping to lock in 250 grassroots endorsers to kick off the election year with strength.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40756263/325810738/-184704588?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzJiNGFmOC0zNDc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OqZmMz__HL8fmwhMEOUnokIknXsZoGTHhbxA-2HYtS0=&emci=c24640f4-1977-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=e32b4af8-3477-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=11663292)**
| **[Endorse Max »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40756264/325810739/-184704588?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzJiNGFmOC0zNDc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OqZmMz__HL8fmwhMEOUnokIknXsZoGTHhbxA-2HYtS0=&emci=c24640f4-1977-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=e32b4af8-3477-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=11663292)**
---

I'm under no illusion that we have a long road ahead, but we’re going to keep showing up and listening to what folks have to say. Unlike LaMalfa, we’re taking local issues seriously -- chief among them are family-sustaining wages, forest and water management, and preventing wildland fires.

**[I hope you're as energized as I am for the election ahead. clean_body: You are why this campaign has made it this far -- and frankly, we are only growing! | = Hey there, friend. It's been a busy few weeks on the campaign trail here in CA-01. This month alone we've held campaign office hours in Redding and Chico. I also hosted a press conference calling out Doug LaMalfa's betrayal of our Democracy after Jan 6th. I'm so proud that I've been able to run an issues-focused campaign centered on the needs of the people. The pundits and establishment want to write us off, but they can't write off the passion I'm seeing in this community and what we're for. We've outraised and outworked Doug LaMalfa, and we're sending a message that we are ready for bold, forward-thinking leadership in the North State. You are why this campaign has made it this far -- and frankly, we are only growing! | I'm under no illusion that we have a long road ahead, but we’re going to keep showing up and listening to what folks have to say. Unlike LaMalfa, we’re taking local issues seriously -- chief among them are family-sustaining wages, forest and water management, and preventing wildland fires. | Team, Republicans have waged war on our democracy.

Every day, our team grows -- and today, I have the honor of welcoming you! Together, we’re working to elect Arizona Democrats from _school boards to the U.S. Senate_ who share our vision for the Copper State.

It’s an exciting time to join Arizona Democrats as we join with students, teachers, union workers, DREAMers, and women to fight for quality jobs, equal rights, a safe place for our families to grow, great schools, a thriving job market, and a government that is accountable to the people.
****
**_We need your help to continue building our success._**

It’s not going to be easy. **Big money and the GOP are fighting us harder than ever, especially after our 2020 victories.** They want to roll back all the progress we’ve made.

**[The stakes couldn’t be higher -- but I know we’re up to the challenge. name: Dr. Kathleen Harder
subject: Fwd: Behind the scenes & new goals
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kathleen Harder for Congress
body:
Peter,
I wanted to make sure you saw the message my finance team sent out yesterday. It’s interesting because campaigns are a whole new ballgame for me. The resilience I built up, becoming a Doctor as a woman (and a mother) means that even when things get tough, I am NOT easily discouraged.
I intend to go to Congress to work on behalf of the good people of Oregon’s 6th District and your support will be the lifeblood of my campaign. I’m excited to get to Washington and represent folks like you, but I can’t do it alone.
Chip in $25 to help me start this campaign on the right foot. I won’t forget your support. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220116-email&amount=25]
Thank you,
Dr. Kathleen Harder
------ Original Message ------
Peter,
Keeping a campaign running is a lot of work. We just wrapped up one of our initial finance meetings of 2022 and thought we would share the categories we are working with for some insight into what we’re trying to do. Before you take a look, donate $10 to Dr. Harder's campaign for Congress so she can fight for you in Washington. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220116-email&amount=10]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220116-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220116-email]
We’ve set our first big goal for the campaign and hope you’ll help us reach it. So, if you haven’t already pledged your support and added your name to our list of donors, today is an excellent opportunity to do so. Donate any amount towards our $2,000 goal to become an official donor of Dr. Harder’s campaign today! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220116-email]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $250 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220116-email&express_lane=true&amount=250] DONATE ANY AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220116-email]
Thank you for supporting this campaign!
Dr. Harder for Congress Finance Team
Democrat Kathleen Harder is a doctor who's been on the frontlines to protect her community against COVID-19. Now, she's answering the call for service again, this time to fight for Oregonians in Congress.

body:
Give it now
[](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxNkU-PnDAMxT8NcwOB-Tdz4NApmh5Gmqo9tFUvKOs4Q7ZJQCHsiP30NSzbrRTl8PPz07MtG8AjIB50AylAmmUVpGWW50lZoCpUJkRd5wBQREX60C6RgxNGPgc_2zHBwR76hk6YntL8qayleMpIiQrwdMRckUCVqepgmj6EcYryTxFc-E2Es6eE7TzJ1WRl4oViYclrFPHzoF2I1eykF3rS7h6zyOoQiFiKXluKp9m_0BLlF2GH2YUob8s0gsqv3p5bGHBI1ld2cLR0oyF5pw86B9tZknq2zMgKbbpe7XwaZo-r1mLnBL-do7Cj0HfHlfdtdXtmF_8fKzZidth325reUCDBxjzl3vBuObhAW_w3WYfj4qfOoYGsLFnUOaMll69fvh3d7XbB0wZ7LXmhbfv99bf683o7H3wjx4c2Rk9Vzbe6rxNtB-LMRquliepzBLD1AWy3gGtx_nWrrj-vbfz1h7BxW5XFY63CZ_7DMtI_6e6SbJtaad3-BTDFve8)

Friend,

**Crime is skyrocketing in America.**

Under Joe Biden's "leadership," you, your family, and _everyone you know, are in more danger_ because violent criminals are taking over our American communities.

_**To put it simply, President Trump was the America First President, while Joe Biden is not.**_

Biden is more worried about restricting the rights of law-abiding Americans than he is about controlling violent criminals, and THAT should tell you everything you need to know, Friend.

Under Joe Biden's "leadership," you, your family, and everyone you know, are in more danger because violent criminals are taking over our American communities. Biden is more worried about restricting the rights of law-abiding Americans than he is about controlling violent criminals, and THAT should tell you everything you need to know, Friend. Something must be done. FAST. We just launched the Official American Crime Report Survey and President Trump specifically requested that we reach out to someone we can trust for input... someone like YOU. name: Morris Katz
subject: We’re already mid-way through January 😯 and I need your help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Hey, it’s Morris, Erica
Smith’s Campaign Manager 👋

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/35163?t=1001&akid=778%2E3698%2ENWUBAg ]If you can spare it, can you rush a donation of $5 or
anything you can to our campaign right now? We’re still $749 short of our
goal so we're extending our mid-month fundraising deadline until midnight
tonight.

Sorry to start out so bluntly, but I’m always going to keep it 100% real
with you and the truth is that this is going to be a tough race. We’re
officially in the election year — that means we have to get our bold,
progressive message out now.

Here’s (3) MAJOR things we’re up against in 2022:

1️⃣ Sandy Smith is a critical threat to our proudly Democratic district
and if she wins this seat she would be an immediate threat to our
razor-thin Democratic majority. (OH, and did I mention she’s a proud
far-right insurrectionist and MAGA supporter?!)

2️⃣ North Carolina’s Second House district (NC-02) has been racially
gerrymandered into a swing district — one we can’t afford to lose. We HAVE
to fight back against Republican seat-stealing and disenfranchisement
attempts.

3️⃣ Big Republican names — like Madison Cawthorn and Donald Trump — have
big plans to make this state completely red so that they can block any and
all progressive progress and ultimately hurt working North Carolinian
families.

Now, I’m not sharing this with you to scare you, but to show you just how critical this
race is. We’re officially in 2022 and it’s not an exaggeration to say that
our country’s future depends on competitive House races like ours in
NC-02.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/35163?t=1002&akid=778%2E3698%2ENWUBAg ]What we raise this month will set the tone for all of 2022. So what do
you say? Can you be one of the donors we desperately need and help us
close our $749 fundraising gap before midnight tonight?

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/35169?refcode=em20220116-778&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=778%2E3698%2ENWUBAg ]Donate $5

For all of us,

Morris
Campaign Manager
Erica Smith for Congress

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220116-778-footer&t=1022&refcode2=778_3698_NWUBAg&akid=778%2E3698%2ENWUBAg

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=778%2E3698%2ENWUBAg

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

body:
| Hi friend!

My name is Heather and I help run Voter Protection Project! We noticed you were about to send a donation, but didn’t complete the process.

I just wanted to reach out and let you know that we rely ENTIRELY on grassroots donors like you to fund our programs supporting strong Democratic candidates who will help us keep and expand our majorities in Congress.

We don’t deal with big dollar donors, shady billionaires, or backroom deals. Just folks like you, chipping in a few bucks at a time. [We’re relying on you, friend: Will you complete the donation you’d previously started? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5015?t=6&akid=1125%2E878179%2E8YAQUS) | [CLICK HERE TO FINISH YOUR DONATION »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5015?t=7&akid=1125%2E878179%2E8YAQUS)
---
Thank you SO MUCH, friend!

Heather
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1125%2E878179%2E8YAQUS). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1125%2E878179%2E8YAQUS).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1125%2E878179%2E8YAQUS) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=1125%2E878179%2E8YAQUS). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1125%2E878179%2E8YAQUS)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeanine=20Lawson?=
subject: We changed Richmond, let’s change Washington!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for by Lawson for Congress")
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| | | Friends,

Yesterday, Virginia turned over a new leaf and swore in new leadership to turn the Commonwealth around. My sincerest congratulations to Glenn Youngkin, Winsome Sears, and Jason Miyares, who represent a new era of common sense governance returning to Virginia.

Glenn Youngkin will repeal the gas tax hike and eliminate the regressive taxes on groceries. Jason Miyares will enforce the rule of law and reform our broken parole board. Winsome will play a pivotal role as a key vote in passible legislation bringing us closer to restoring our majority in the state Senate.

We have taken back Virginia, in 2022 we will take back Congress!

Locally, we have seen a need for reform. Where soft on crime Commonwealth Attorneys have failed parents and citizens, Jason Miyares will ensure we keep our families safe.

Where woke schools have pushed an agenda in the classroom, Glenn Youngkin will get back to teaching kids how to think, not what to think.

I am proud to stand with them.

Jennifer Wexton has failed to put safety and parents first and remained silent on the scandals that our Republican ticket took on.

The 10th district deserves better than Jennifer Wexton’s inaction. Those concerned about the safety of our children deserve better, and hardworking Virginians deserve better than her pushing higher utility bills and taxes on our families.

We unseated the radicals who had taken over Richmond, and next year we will take back Congress and defeat Jennifer Wexton.

But I need your help.
---

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Photos from Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
One week ago today, Ron Johnson announced his re-election campaign.

Since then, he’s been laser-focused on grabbing headlines, appearing on _Fox News_ , and tweeting about the attacks against his campaign. The guy only cares about himself.

I’m focused on running a campaign that’s all about _you_. That’s why we’re traveling across Wisconsin talking with workers and families about the issues that matter most in their communities.

Last week, we were in La Crosse meeting with teachers and community leaders to talk about the challenges they’re facing in this ongoing pandemic — and most importantly, what we can do to help.

Then, we went to Oshkosh where we met with folks right in Ron Johnson’s backyard to talk about the urgent need to pass critical family and workplace infrastructure like paid leave, affordable child care, and much more. We also discussed the importance of protecting our democracy by passing voting rights legislation, especially as Republicans ramp up their attacks on voting rights and our elections.

Finally, we met with working parents from across the state to discuss the importance of extending the expanded child tax credit, which lifted millions of kids and families out of poverty. Parents and caregivers have been pushed to the brink during this pandemic, and quite frankly, a little breathing room shouldn’t be too much to ask for.

Ron Johnson isn’t working for the people of Wisconsin. This year, we need to replace him with someone who will. That’s why I got in this race, and why I’m focused on building a campaign around the issues most important to working families.

[**Today, I’m asking you to join me in this campaign with a small contribution. Your support will allow us to stay on the road, traveling all over Wisconsin, and meeting folks where they’re at to get our positive message out. clean_body: At midnight, our campaign has an important fundraising deadline. Let me explain why it is so important we hit our fundraising goal. | Fellow American, At midnight, our campaign has an important fundraising deadline. Let me explain why it is so important we hit our fundraising goal: 1. I am running for Governor of Texas against a well-funded incumbent opponent. To overcome these advantages, my campaign is counting on the grassroots conservatives, like yourself, to make up the difference and build the momentum we need to win. 2. The Biden administration has opened our borders - allowing tens of thousands of illegals to pour into Texas. We must TAKE BACK control of our border. Fellow American, the Biden administration is abusing its power to impose their radical and harmful agenda onto Texas, and Our Governor is allowing it to unfold on his watch. Steadfast and Loyal, Allen B. West Lieutenant Colonel (Ret) | | POL. ADV. PAID FOR BY ALLEN WEST CAMPAIGN The election laws in Texas allow for unlimited donation amounts as long as the funds are not from an incorporated entity.
