Peter,
Last week, at his son’s high school basketball game, Tennessee State Rep. Jeremy Faison got so angry at a referee that he tried to fight — and pants — the guy.********
That’s right, pants. I wish I were joking.

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEiNtFnEqROArqDSm80XKABQm53aa9CkuX8N_6szO56jGs_CdowSUcwAOIYZE_TMQyBB9YUSTH6U9fbvmWzkOGAw7s_VXrGrtatHIPrwxPI0-7tK_cFVGFqt6YfwB53MnGHzPv-HMRjOPeQl4Udlqo3nZSYsmdcg5Nz1840JOCRwlIUKF8v8HwD3uHUB_sD40QooGXbyci8C2hHqNSvcuCbGHw5H27ArOculNMCtYGas4YX-sUVdMqBXSFcKlHKB7SnUN02O5sBVUwSrcdfU2DX0GWaktwieMxeVkoz3z2EVzm1d0hN64y6VvbmMZK5SVo741yNiyzQZ-zWESiQ_TLocKK2To4aeczpC-GRaNLgaVA/3ir/Rq4LOQGWRaa_ew8Zl0oYvA/h2/v1oYmkk8BNHf48yjjPzDMTBhDmT62UQxN5Nrk0tWgeI)
Not only is this clown the House GOP Chair, he’s a member of the House Redistricting Committee. **That** **means he was one of the legislators who voted on Wednesday to approve the new Congressional maps to break apart our progressive stronghold here in Tennessee.**
Peter, I’ll be honest. Watching lawmakers like this man wield power and purposefully dilute the voices of Black, brown, and working class people in Nashville has me deeply frustrated, saddened, and angry.
This is no longer a democracy where everyone’s voices are heard. This is the new Jim Crow, where racist politicians will do anything to erase us and strip power from us. **But I refuse to back down in the face of white supremacy, and if you’re with me, I need your help right now.**

[**_We’re working to mobilize thousands of Tennessee voters to fight back against gerrymandering — but we’re running short on resources. Will you chip in whatever you can today to ensure we can reach as many people as possible?_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEiNtFnEqROArqDSm80XKABQm53aa9CkuX8N_6szO56jGu0vqJk6OlTYUyUTSwDAI5ZHG2SIOhs3PshMu2wLI7towIH5df0IgwwTZumontECJvYySvlXOyYT-oLg25aazbR3MRe4BTOmJO8ETh1Ne4xaBoUZMTK0GeOP-E1Ysr1l7SX4U3LKLkL75Cyj6fMpio2tTw4Mrk81SKFu557jlonx844GgCfaTFsJt6uJFVX-ywrqW8sRTpZEYPi31A_i25Id0sDxH03IYSC2LvMhE60gSLs6vA8SwjVDVPGi_miDhx0kO8zSDsJKANtqb-c-fNYoAsApyYjKKvcGpEzZI6MIM_Ddcdms99PnNvs6GbGK3M/3ir/Rq4LOQGWRaa_ew8Zl0oYvA/h3/G8lJKifze2nVkRuvrhAsshblNFkHT9-vESSUqYx8Mjc)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brice=20Wiggins?=
subject: Brice Wiggins Weekly Legislative & Campaign Trail Update Jan. 16, 2022
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/7e9726264bab/brice-wiggins-for-congress-highlights-from-the-campaign-trail-8790357?e=698f056321)
Logo

Here is a recap of a few highlights from this week in my role as State Senator from District 52, as well as updates from our Congressional Campaign. Fulfilling my duties as State Senator will be a top priority for me during this campaign. After all, I took an oath to honorably serve my constituents and the Constitution.

"Never be satisfied with less than your very best effort. If you strive for the top and miss, you'll still 'beat the pack."

- Gerald R. Ford

** Wiggins: Visited The Coffee Shop at Southern Turnings
------------------------------------------------------------

It was great to catch up with Scott Madux at Southern Turnings! What a wonderful business! Where else can you see woodworking done, get coffee, and buy your wife something she'll love! Small businesses are the backbone of Mississippi and Scott and Jane, the owners, have something special going. Click HERE (https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=304c32b0b0&e=698f056321) to check out their Facebook and give them a follow!

** Teacher Pay Raise
------------------------------------------------------------

I am proud to say a significant pay raise for teachers is on the horizon this legislative session. As a member of the Senate Education Committee, I can tell you this is a priority of this session. The House and Senate each unveiled a plan that greatly increases teacher pay, with differences to be worked out. Teachers are the backbone of our education system, and getting them to the Southeastern average will be the goal. I definitely will be voting for these bills! Click HERE (https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=24a799225d&e=698f056321) to read the Y’all Politics’ article on teacher pay raise to learn more.

** Judiciary A Committee Meeting
------------------------------------------------------------

Tuesday was the first meeting of the Judiciary A Committee. This is one of the “Big 6” committees that oversee all legal issues throughout the state along with procedural issues in criminal law. I am proud to chair this committee and this week we unveiled recommendations from the Domestic and Family Law Task Force.

Click HERE (https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=618224f229&e=698f056321) to watch the full committee meeting.

** Critical Race Theory In Our Schools: Challenging Mississippi Department of Education
------------------------------------------------------------

“The fact that there’s even any interest in or connection to Critical Race Theory in these standards is absolutely crazy considering everything that’s going on in the country right now.”---Brice to Dr. Carrie Wright.

The statement above is something I said during the Senate Education meeting on Wednesday in which I questioned Dr. Carrie Wright, the Mississippi Superintendent of Education, on the new social studies curriculum that was recently proposed. I am not afraid to stand up and ask the hard questions, especially when it involves the education of our children. My plan is to attend the scheduled hearing on January 28th to ensure that critical race theory does not creep its way into Mississippi schools’ curriculum.

Click HERE (https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=4f8f0c9f53&e=698f056321) to read the full article where I was quoted by Y’all Politics.

** Medical Marijuana Bill Has Passed The Senate
------------------------------------------------------------

This past Thursday, the medical marijuana bill passed the Senate with a 47-5 vote and now goes to the House for consideration. The people expressed their will through the Initiative 65 process, and with the leadership of Senator Kevin Blackwell and Representative Lee Yancey, the legislature has provided the people with what they have asked for, a medical marijuana program. Getting here took a lot of twists and turns, but after working with the people, the legislature has delivered.

The Senate vote, including my ‘Yes’ vote, reflects the will of Mississippians, and I'm proud to stand with them, not against them like some in this Congressional race have.

** Vaccine Mandates: U.S. Supreme Court Blocks Biden’s Vaccine Mandate for Businesses
------------------------------------------------------------

On Thursday, the U.S. Supreme Court blocked the Biden Administration’s vaccine mandate. This is a victory for our Constitutional principles. This is also proof of the Biden administration’s overreach that I have pledged to stand up against (Click HERE (https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=30e53c8757&e=698f056321) to watch my policy video on fighting government overreach to learn more). I am not content to simply stand by. In fact, carrying out what I promised to do, I have drafted a bill that will classify employees' vaccination status as “social, civil, or political rights” as defined by the Mississippi Constitution and thus protected if violated. Click HERE (https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=f1eb429e7f&e=698f056321) to learn more about my statement.

** Hattiesburg: Mississippi Osteopathic Medical Association
------------------------------------------------------------

I met with MOMA (Mississippi Osteopathic Medical Association) and leadership from the College of Osteopathic Medicine at William Carey University in Hattiesburg to talk about the planned William Carey Primary Care Institute. Hattiesburg is the anchor of healthcare in the Pine Belt, and I am committed to making it the best in the state!

** Early Childhood Capitol Day
------------------------------------------------------------

Elizabeth “Biz” Harris of Laurel is a “rising star” in Mississippi early childhood circles. Without hesitation, I agreed to sponsor Early Childhood Capitol Day next week. Biz is Deputy Director of the Mississippi Early Learning Alliance (https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=431b33c69d&e=698f056321) .

Click HERE (https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=2034bd75b8&e=698f056321) to watch our video to learn more on the nationally ranked Early Learning Collaborative law I authored as well as the importance of early childhood education.

** Mississippi Counseling Association
------------------------------------------------------------

It’s always great to meet up with friends from South Mississippi, Melissa Windham and Leigh Ann Woods (Pascagoula High School Guidance Counselor) with the Mississippi Counseling Association. Through the pandemic, this group has worked tirelessly in developing new methods to offer counseling to Mississippians during these trying times. We are very appreciative of their hard work.

** Gulfport: Coffee at Petie’s Eats
------------------------------------------------------------

Friday morning I sat down with the “regulars” and solved all of the country’s problems over coffee and breakfast! I’m thankful for Harrison County Tax Collector Sharon Barnett for always keeping us straight! #breakfastclub

** The Week Ahead
------------------------------------------------------------
* Monday Will Be The Deadline for All Bills To Be Filed
* First Meeting of the First Responders Caucus
* Budget Hearings
* Senate Consideration of Teacher Pay Raise Legislation

Please stay tuned for future emails with updates from the legislative session, District 52, community events, and our Congressional campaign. Our campaign is in full swing and as you know, getting our message out takes funding. If you would like to provide financial support, please click the button below.

| | **We couldn’t agree more with what Schumer said in 2005. But it shouldn’t surprise you that Chuck Schumer will do just about anything to push through his crazy, radical, left-wing agenda. ** **What is his newest idea? Getting rid of the filibuster to pass the atrocious voting rights bill which would only make it easier to cheat in elections. If this bill goes through the Senate, Republicans will never win another election again... ** [****SAVE THE FILIBUSTER ****](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/1cLCoYF3KT8WZsLbDc6y274g) **Chuck Schumer has a history of telling lies, but this has gone too far. ** **_SCHUMER THEN >>_** **[](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/1cLCLsME0hDWO4Mgv8Gldgap)** **We need to**STOP CHUCK AND NANCY IMMEDIATELY** before they eliminate the filibuster and put the very foundation of our democracy at risk. ** [**_Sign our petition now to save the filibuster, We need your help now more than ever. _**](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/1cLD7WUefG8WCGNln5g8opgy) **Thank you, ** **Jim Inhofe**

body:
Are you ready for your free T-Shirt from Nick4WA?

| [ ](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_challenge&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, We need to meet our goal this month. So we are offering a free T-Shirt to the person who can get us the most donations! Yes, I said it correctly the person who gets us the most donations. How does it work? Start by **[Clicking Here](https://www.nick4wa.com/januarychallenge?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_challenge&n=2)** to go to our recruiter page where your special code will be available. **Make sure you are signed in or signup to get your unique code.** Follow the rule:
* No Purchase is required - Void where prohibited
* The contest is based on points earned
* Signup = 10 Points
* Signup and Donation = 30 Points
* Your current Candidate Support Points were sent to you in the original email if you were already a supporter.
* For new signups, your support points will be emailed to you on January 22nd and 29th.
* The winner will be contacted via email on or before February 5th, 2022.
* Your donations to the campaign count as well. Each donation is worth 20 points. **[Donate Here](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzvgzq9eVrS2wcfSTH4cualzbe-f2Cw39hQ8b5qIWD078nxHFLEVlu36w_EcyQRnbNg&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_challenge&n=3)**
* The contest starts 1/16/2022 and Ends 1/31/2022

**Win a T-shirt or other great prizes** [](https://www.nick4wa.com/januarychallenge?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_challenge&n=4) **_YOUR CURRENT CANDIDATE SUPPORT POINT (CSP) VALUE IS:_**
#### **_10CSP_**

additional ways to earn points). _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: name: Sign on >> (via Team Ryan)
subject: URGENT: Ban Members of Congress from trading stocks!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2051%2E3611125%2ED8_rDR ][IMG]

Folks—

We have a hot take that really shouldn’t be a hot take: Members of
Congress and their spouses should NOT be allowed to trade stocks.

Tim has come out in strong support of legislation banning members of
Congress from buying and trading stocks, but now we need strong grassroots
support to pass it into law!

[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_220116_EN_MoCStockBan_A0_na_U1_X1_M2?t=1007&akid=2051%2E3611125%2ED8_rDR ]We need 3,500 signatures by midnight tonight. Will you add your name to
our petition to ban insider trading and level the playing field for
hardworking Ohioans?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_220116_EN_MoCStockBan_A0_na_U1_X1_M2?t=1010&akid=2051%2E3611125%2ED8_rDR ]Sign your name now >>

Members of Congress have access to highly confidential information that
the public does not. Buying and trading stocks for the same companies that
they are making laws for is a gross conflict of interest. But this is
still legal thanks to politicians who only look out for their own bottom
line.

When the scales are tipped so far in the favor of those in power, we need
to make a BIG change. And banning members of Congress from using their
position to grow their bank accounts is a HUGE step in the right
direction.

Then, when Tim is elected Senator and expands the Democratic majority,
he’ll champion legislation to cut workers in on the deal.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_220116_EN_MoCStockBan_A0_na_U1_X1_M2?t=1008&akid=2051%2E3611125%2ED8_rDR ]Add your name to send a message to the members of Congress who abuse
their power that their time is up. >>

[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_220116_EN_MoCStockBan_A0_na_U1_X1_M2?t=1011&akid=2051%2E3611125%2ED8_rDR ]Sign your name now >>

—Team Ryan

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=2051%2E3611125%2ED8_rDR ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=2051%2E3611125%2ED8_rDR ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1004&akid=2051%2E3611125%2ED8_rDR ]Donate Monthly
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/49?t=1005&akid=2051%2E3611125%2ED8_rDR ]Donate Once

Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
Tim Ryan for Ohio
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
United States
[ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11?t=1006&akid=2051%2E3611125%2ED8_rDR ][IMG]

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

name: Team Malliotakis
subject: You can help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nicole for New York (Federal)
body:
Return to greatness

| [](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=6a753d5281c2468c8c2ebba896ee2578&_e=5gaMgU4AIpveRNwVAgCalZ43k6LZSrCvw5Ab7OFtKsSuhhRG_f3RJwepjOvnffs_Rjgydc8--Q30HDlgAht-X6YikcunSq4SDCEDjSMBG6ruZcSNKuKvAGI8D67RMA3C8MIc17fKTr_1aPQvz-Kyl8l_bNxi_S_mrQJBzg39l78MjCB2Sno6JgoVBMa-IvALh-NMpCWih-F6TOyqNwfZgQjqiqOtBj79FY2cRVQNV5pBFbR4Wk2yC8zx12Asonj2_bFL9y6SEVelbG2DTwoFOqOM1W-KTFZOBSVgMbQ34My46qA75vP-DFEULGhUitzTqQBLLlF4HAq3pmrprK7apvDxucfSw4T72F8rXKJiuPmNbrmTEUbaIFdMj9KcYR3cgkTrmuxvSEsJmnBY4zSAja77AXKz8QiILM-qlQ4nuTqnxHZ5Iu_qbpeDMfK4HWv_TzGbEWsM-zB3SrI4gYzca0yiYv81j_VNnJ6wEEaIRl6f6AY1KVCwNSgS7f_PPs1K)
---

Friend,

**We’re approaching our Mid-Month Goal, and Nicole wants a list of donors on her desk by tomorrow morning.**

She values her supporters more than **ANYTHING** and wants to make sure that she has people that she can count on in the upcoming election. | [**PUT MY NAME DOWN**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=6a753d5281c2468c8c2ebba896ee2578&_e=5gaMgU4AIpveRNwVAgCalZ43k6LZSrCvw5Ab7OFtKsSuhhRG_f3RJwepjOvnffs_Rjgydc8--Q30HDlgAht-X6YikcunSq4SDCEDjSMBG6ruZcSNKuKvAGI8D67RMA3C8MIc17fKTr_1aPQvz-Kyl8l_bNxi_S_mrQJBzg39l78MjCB2Sno6JgoVBMa-IvALh-NMpCWih-F6TOyqNwfZgQjqiqOtBj79FY2cRVQNV5pBFbR4Wk2yC8zx12Asonj2_bFL9y6SEVelbG2DTwoFOqOM1W-KTFZOBSVgMbQ34MyA1UYqXIsRkSIlUN7lGz1geI_v3fHoYVbnb32XvEz1qmPNtfPAXi80FEGRLCPkj3yJCxqsj7_YoX7WrEBy3JjOETV1_1pq2wjyyisiTY6dgb_h1viI3w49lh47k1r9BnXiv7Hpq4fQtvFFokjGXUnFKX9K1UFNr5EXcB3nzZRw1uKyrcV-_iJ_ynCMVA9zay5vZq3hYWW_H5OYkZhupvf1)
---
_**So the question remains:**_

**Do you value safety for your family, elected officials you can trust, lowering the cost of living, and improving the economy?**

They are purposely putting Americans in harm's way in our schools, at work and in public. We can’t trust anti-science Republicans to govern when they refuse to listen to the experts when it comes to public health, climate change, economic inequality, and more. Melanie D’Arrigo is running for U.S. Congress to fight for science and protect hard-working Americans. **** for standing with the science and trusting the experts. – Team D’Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. If you’d rather contribute by check, feel free to make the check out to the following address: Friends of Melanie Darrigo P.O. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rp-email Hi there, [_I need to raise $1,860 in the next 24 hours to be on track for fundraising this month. I’m raising money for mailers, ads, and videos. If you can afford to, please rush a $3 donation now to help me get there, because I don’t take corporate cash and every dollar you give adds up._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40756603/325812970/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDExNWMwNS01MTc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lmjE7JjwD6j8p-YNFixa9vpSaqp1Ysj1gnsDt33c1tU=) I watched the movie _Don’t Look Up_ yesterday. It’s a satire of how society is treating the climate emergency. In the movie, a comet is heading towards Earth that will destroy the entire planet...and everyone just ignores the danger. Every day feels that with the climate crisis. It’s like we’re living in an alternate reality. Instead of trying to save the planet and human civilization, both parties continue on their merry way: approving drilling permits and handing out subsidies to the fossil fuel industry. [**I’m running for Congress because we need to radically change our approach to climate change and we need to end the fossil fuel industry by 2030. Can you chip in now to help me win?
